Q3 Fill Co.是一间开采煤矿的公司，并会将开采好的煤矿在现货市场和远期市场上进行交易，因 预测煤炭未来三年价格会发生下跌，因此 Fill Co. 会考虑下述两个事项。 a) i) 在旧的理论框架中对于存货价值的计量 在最新版本的理论框架中规定了对于入表科目的计量分为：历史成本 (Historical cost),重 置 成 本 (Current cost),现 值 (Present value of future cashflows)和公允价值 (Fair value)。而根据 IAS 2的规定，存货应该按照成本和可变现净值选择孰低的金额来计量 (Inventory should be valued at the lower of cost and net realisable value)。因此当理论框架和准则产生冲突的时候， 还是要以准则为准。 因此对于开采出来的煤炭， Fill Co.先应该按照成本去计量，但公司预测未来的存货价值会 出现下滑，即开采的煤炭可能会出现减值，因此在年末的时候需要去考虑煤炭的可变现净值。 而对于煤炭的可变现净值核算的时候，需要考虑煤炭最近的售价并扣除预计销售煤炭产生的 销售成本。若煤炭的成本低于可变现净值，视为该存货发生了减值，该减值金额应确认为 Fill Co. 费用。 ii) 如何去计算煤炭的可变现净值 对于煤炭的可变现净值计算，需要考虑该煤炭预测的售价扣除产生的交易费用/销售成本。 若出现减值，该减值金额计入 Fill Co.当期损益。因为煤炭是大宗产品，价格易发生波动，如 果后续价格出现回升，那么涨幅的金额是不可以超过前期减值的金额。 b) 对于挖矿设备的定期维护所应做出的的会计处理及煤炭价格下跌是否为挖矿设备出现减 值的一个迹象判定 Accounting treatment on reconditioned cost 根据题意，挖矿设备 (Mining equipment) 需要定期进行维护保养 (Reconditioned), 该 维 护 保养是为了机器设备可以正常运转并给公司持续带来经济利益，若不做常规维护保养，该机 器性能将会大幅度下降。因此根据 IAS 16的要求，常规的维护保养是需要进行资本化的，因 此题中所给出的2 million的维护材料和1million的人工费用都需要作为该设备成本的一部分。 并且该资本化的部分计提折旧的年限为2年，因为每一次维护保养的间隔为2年。 · Director 想针对下一次维护保养计提预计负债，但是题中明确标注了没有任何现时的责任或 义务要去做该维护保养，因此是不可以计提预计负债，否则会涉及到盈余管理 (Earnings management) 的问题。 Impairment indicator 根据IAS 36的规定，只有当固定资产出现减值迹象的时候才需要对该资产做减值测试，即需 要计算出现减值迹象资产的可回收金额。煤炭价格的下跌通常会让企业减少产能，进而会降 低挖矿设备的运转，并导致设备所给企业带来的经济收益发生下滑，最终导致减值的出现。 但因煤炭属于大宗产品，价格会受到供需关系的影响，因此价格会波动性较大。如果波动性 不大，其实并不太会影响到挖矿设备的性能，也不会让资产出现减值，所以需要企业做出一 些专业判断 (Professional judgement)。 但题中公司已做出预测，未来三年的煤炭价格会比现在煤炭平均价格下跌20%,价格下跌幅 度大会极有可能影响到设备的性能，因此在本题中公司还是需要在年末对挖矿设备做出资产 减值测试。 c) 判定 Fill Co.能否对 Thea Mine 产生控制 Fill Co. 已经持有了Theta Mine 28% 的股份，而 Theta Mine 剩下72%的股份被剩余的三个 投资者所平分，即其他三位投资者均拥有24%的股份。现在Fill Co. 考虑再继续收购另一位 投资者手中24%的股份。 如果不考虑Joint control 的条款，那么 FillCo.已经获得了Theta Mine 52% 的股份，收购方 持有被收购方股份50%以上站在考试的层面，可视为已经获得了控制权。但是站在IFRS 10 的角度，控制的体现主要在三个方面： 拥有对被投资方的权力； 通过参与被投资方的相关活动而享有可变回报； 有能力运用对被投资方的权力影响其回报金额。 但是在合约条款中规定任何决策都需要获得72%股份的赞成。因此一旦 Fill Co. 收购成功， 持股比例达到52%,但还是不能够控制Theta Mine; 但剩余股份的持有者也无法单独做出决 策 。

Q4 (a)The IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary provides a broad,non-binding framework for the presentation of management commentary which relates to financial statements which have been prepared in accordance with IFRS Standards.The management commentary is within the scope of the Conceptual Framework and,therefore,the qualitative characteristics will be applied to both the financial statements and the management commentary. Requirement
explanation_zh: (i)Discuss briefly the arguments for and against issuing the IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary as a non-binding framework or as an IFRS Standard.(4 marks) 讨论一下IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary作为a non-binding framework的优 缺点或者作为一个IFRS 的优缺点。 答案 解析： (a)(i)The IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary provides a broad,non-binding framework for the presentation of management commentary.The Practice Statement is not an IFRS Standard.Consequently,entities applying IFRS Standards are not required to comply with the Practice Statement,unless specifically required by their jurisdiction.Furthermore, non-compliance with the Practice Statement will not prevent an entity's financial statements from complying with IFRS Standards. 就目前情况来看的话，IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary 作 为management commentary 的指引，只是一个non-binding framework, 并不是属于IFRS 。所以按照国际会 计准则做账的公司并不是必须要遵循该IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary。除 非该企业所在的管辖区域明确要求必须遵循。该企业就算不遵守 IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary 也并不妨碍其编制的财报是遵守国际会计准则的。 It can be argued that the International Accounting Standards Board's (the Board)objectives of enhancing consistency and comparability may not be achieved if the framework is not mandatory. A standard is more likely to guarantee a consistent application of the principles and practices behind the management commentary(MC). 因为该IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary不是属于国际会计准则，所以不是 每个公司必须要遵循，所以有的公司遵循，有的公司不遵循，这会使得不同公司编制的MC 不具有可比性或者不一致。如果 IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary 能够成为 一个准则的话，那么说明所有的公司必须遵循，那么就能做到一致性。 However,it is difficult to create a standard on the MC which is sufficiently detailed to cover the business models of every entity or be consistent with all IFRS Standards.Some jurisdictions take little notice of non-mandatory guidance but the Practice Statement provides regulators with a framework to develop more authoritative requirements. 但是，国际会计准则委员会很难针对MC 去创建一个足够详细统一的标准，以涵盖每个实 体的业务模型或符合所有IFRS 标准的标准。有些管辖区域很少注意到非强制性指导，但 IFRS Practice Statement Management Commentary 为监管机构制定更权威的要求提供了一个 框架。 The Practice Statement allows companies to adapt the information provided to particular aspects of their business.This flexible approach could help generate more meaningful disclosures about resources,risks and relationships which can affect an entity's value and how these resources are managed.It provides management with an opportunity to add context to the published financial information,and to explain their future strategy and objectives without being restricted by the constraints of a standard. The Practice Statement 因为目前只是一个指引，不是强制性必须遵守的国际会计准则，那么 这对于公司而言更灵活，因为各个公司可以根据自己公司的特殊情况去选择到底要披露什么 内容，比如披露公司的资源、风险、关系网。它为管理层提供了一个机会，在已公布的财务 信息中增加了一个内容，用来解释其未来的战略和目标，且在描述这些内容的时候不受标准 的限制。 If the MC were a full IFRS Standard,the integration of management commentaries and the information produced in accordance with IFRS Standards could be challenged on technical grounds,as well as its practical merits.In addition,there could be jurisdictional concerns that any form of integration might not be accepted by local regulators. 如果MC 是一个完整的IFRS 标准，如何将 MC 和按照国际会计准则编制出来的信息进行整 合可能会因为技术原因和实际情况而受到挑战。此外，可能存在司法问题，即任何形式的整 合可能不会被地方监管机构接受。 Requirement解析： (ii)Discuss how the qualitative characteristics of understandability,relevance and comparability should be applied to the preparation of the management commentary.(5 marks) 在编制MC 的时候应该如何使得信息满足可理解性、相关性和可比性。 答案解析： (ii)The Framework states that ‘an essential quality of the information provided in financial statements is that it is readily understandable by users'.The MC should be written in plain language and a style appropriate to users'needs.The primary users of management commentary are those identified in the Conceptual Framework.The form and content of the MC will vary between entities,reflecting the nature of their business,the strategies adopted and the regulatory environment in which they operate. 该框架指出，“财务报表中提供的信息的一个基本质量是，用户很容易理解它”。MC 应该用 简单的语言和适合用户需要的风格来编写。管理评论的主要用户是那些在概念框架中确定的 用户。MC 的形式和内容将因公司的不同而有所不同，以反映其业务性质、所采用的策略以 及其所处的监管环境。 Users should be able to locate information relevant to their needs.Information has the quality of relevance when it has the capacity to influence the economic decisions of users by helping them evaluate past,present or future events or confirming,or correcting,their past evaluations. Relevant financial information is capable of making a difference to the decision made by users.In order to make a difference,financial information has predictive value,confirmatory value or both. The onus is on management to determine what information is important enough to be included in the MC to enable users to 'understand'the financial statements and meet the objective of the MC. If the entity provides too much information,it could reduce its relevance and understandability.If material events or uncertainties are not disclosed,then users may have insufficient information to meet their needs. MC 应该让用户能够找到与他们的需求相关的信息。当信息有能力通过帮助用户评估过去、 现在或未来的事件，或确认或纠正他们过去的评估，来影响用户的经济决策时，这些信息就 具有相关性。相关的财务信息能够影响到用户的决定。为了发挥作用，财务信息具有预测价 值、验证性价值或两者兼有。管理层有责任确定哪些信息足够重要，可以包含在MC 中 ， 以使用户能够“理解”财务报表，并满足MC 的目标。如果该公司提供了太多的信息，它可能 会降低其相关性和可理解性。如果没有披露重大事件或不确定性，那么用户可能没有足够的 信息来满足他们的需求。 However,unnecessary detail may obscure important information especially if entities adopt a boiler-plate approach.If management presents too much information about,for example,all the risks facing an organisation,this will conflict with the relevance objective.There is no single optimal number of disclosures but it is useful to convey their relative importance in a meaningful way. 然而，不必要的细节可能会掩盖重要的信息，特别是如果公司采用boiler-plate approach。例 如，如果管理层提供了太多的信息，比如一个组织面临的所有风险，这将与相关性目标相冲 突。没有一种最佳披露方法，但以一种有意义的方式传达它们的相对重要性是有用的。 Comparability is the qualitative characteristic which enables users to identify and understand similarities and differences amongst items.It is important for users to be able to compare information over time and between entities.Comparability between entities is problematic as the MC is designed to reflect the perspectives of management and the circumstances of individual entities.Thus,entities in the same industry may have different perceptions of what is important and how they measure and report it.There are some precedents on how to define and calculate non-financial measures and financial measures which are not produced in accordance with IFRS Standards but there are inconsistencies in the definition and calculation of these measures. 可比性是一种质量特征，它使用户能够识别和理解项目之间的异同。对于用户来说，能够随 着时间的推移和公司之间进行比较信息是很重要的。公司之间的可比性是有问题的，因为 MC 的设计是为了反映管理的观点和个别公司的环境。因此，同一行业的公司可能对什么是 重要的以及它们如何衡量和报告它有不同的看法。存在关于如何定义和计算非财务核算信息 和不按照IFRS 标准产生的财务核算信息的范例，但这些定义和计算之间存在不一致。 It is sometimes suggested that the effectiveness of the overall report may be enhanced by strengthening the links between financial statements and the MC.However,such suggestions raise concerns about maintaining a clear distinction between the financial statement information and other information.An entity should ensure consistency in terms of wording,definitions,segment disclosures,etc between the financial statements and the MC to improve the understanding of financial performance. 有时有人建议，通过加强财务报表与MC 之间的联系，可以提高整体报告的有效性。但是， 这些建议引起了人们对在财务报表信息和其他信息之间保持明确区分的关切。一个公司应确 保财务报表与 MC 之间在措辞、定义、部分披露等方面的一致性，以提高对财务业绩的理 解 。 Requirement解析： (b)With reference to the above information,explain to the investor,the nature of accounting for taxation in financial statements. Note:Your answer should explain the tax reconciliation,discuss the implications of current and future tax rates,and provide an explanation of accounting for deferred taxation in accordance with relevant IFRS Standards.(14 marks) 答案解析： 解题思路： - 先解释CT 的计算为什么用应税利润而不是会计利润 -中间的几段是在解释题目中tax reconciliation的表格中的那些明细项目 -再者是在回答递延所得税的概念和原理以及用到的税率的选择 -其中细致的分析了确认DTA 的前提条件 -解释了计算递延所得税负债为什么要用25%的税率 -结合案例计算公式当期具体能够确认的 DTL 的金额和具体能够确认的DTA 的金额 -解释了关于所得税的列示 - 解释了关于所得税的披露 整个题目14分，写出以下14个点即可

stem_zh: 1. Current tax is based on taxable profit for the year.Taxable profit is different from accounting profit due to temporary differences between accounting and tax treatments,and due to items which are never taxable or tax deductible. 【解释为什么CT 要依据应税利润去计算】 Tax reconciliation Tax reconciliation

2. The tax rate reconciliation is important for understanding the tax charge reported in the financial statements and why the effective tax rate differs from the statutory rate.【进行 tax rate reconciliation 的作用和目的】

3. Most companies will reconcile the group's annual tax expense to the statutory rate in the country in which the parent is based.Hence the rate of 22%is used in the tax reconciliation. It is important that the reconciliation explains the reasons for the differences between the effective rate and the statutory rate.【 解释为什么进行 tax rate reconciliation 的时候用的 22%的税率】

4. There should be minimal use of the ‘other’category.In this case,the other category is quite significant($14 million)and there is no explanation of what ‘other'constitutes.【解释了tax rate reconciliation当中的other category 这一行，指出其不足之处是未对14m 进行细致解 释】

5. Some profits recognised in the financial statements are non-taxable such as the tax relating to non-taxable gains on disposals of businesses and in some jurisdictions,taxation relief on impairment losses will not be allowable for taxation.The reasons for these items not being allowed for taxation should be explained to investors.【解 释 了 tax rate reconciliation 当 中 第 五行第六行为什么一个需要纳税调增一个需要纳税调减】 Tax rates

6. As the Group is operating in multiple countries,the actual tax rates applicable to profits in those countries are different from the local tax rate.The overseas tax rates are higher than local rates,hence the increase in the taxation charge of$10m.The local rate is different from the weighted average tax rate(27%)of the Group based on the different jurisdictions in which it operates.Investors may feel that using the weighted tax rate in the reconciliation gives a more meaningful number because it is a better estimate of the tax rate the Group expects to pay over the long term.Investors will wish to understand the company's expected long-term sustainable tax rate so they can prepare their cash flow or profit forecasts.【解释了 tax rate reconciliation的第二行，为什么进行纳税调增，因为海外子公司的税率其实比母 公司自己的税率要高，所以投资者会认为直接使用整个集团的税率27%可能会更合适】

7. Information about the sustainability of the tax rate over the long term is more important than whether the rate is high or low compared to other jurisdictions.An adjustment can be made to an investor's financial model for a long-term sustainable rate,but not for a volatile rate where there is no certainty over future performance.For modeling purposes,an understanding of the actual cash taxes paid is critical and the cash paid of $95 million can be found in the statement of cash flows. 【投资者其实更关心公司的 future performance, 未来的业务形 成的利润肯定是用未来的税率去计算的，那么关于未来的税率是多少披露给投资方可能 具 有 意 义 ， 即 sustainability of the tax rate over the long term 】 Deferred taxation

8. Provision for deferred tax is made for temporary differences between the carrying amount of assets and liabilities for financial reporting purposes and their value for tax purposes.The amount of deferred tax reflects the expected recoverable amount and is based on the expected manner of recovery or settlement of the carrying amount of assets and liabilities,using the basis of taxation enacted or substantively enacted by the financial statement date.【这边主要 在解释递延所得税的概念和原理，以及计算递延所得税的时候用什么税率】

9. Management assesses the available evidence to estimate if sufficient future taxable income will be generated to use the existing deferred tax assets.A significant piece of objective negative evidence evaluated was the loss incurred in the period prior to the period ended 30 November 20X7.Such objective evidence may limit the ability to consider other subjective evidence such as projections for future growth.【这段主要在说递延所得税资产的确认前提 条件是未来有足够多的应税利润或者是应税义务，但是去年公司都是巨大亏损，这对于 我们在预估未来的营业状况的时候会产生消极的影响】

10. As the proposed tax law was approved,it is considered to be enacted.Therefore,the rate of 25%should be used to calculate the deferred tax liability associated with the relevant items which affect deferred taxation.【解释为什么计算递延所得税的时候要用25%的税率】

11. At 30 November 20X7,Holls has taxable temporary differences of $5 million which relate to the same taxable company and the tax authority,thus a deferred tax liability of $1.25 million ($5 million x 25%)should be recognised.【 解释存在应纳税暂时性差异所以要确认递延 所得税负债】

12. Holls has deductible temporary differences of $4.5 million which are expected to reverse in the next year.As only $3 million of these taxable temporary differences are expected to reverse in the year in which the deductible temporary differences reverse,thus Holls can also recognise a deferred tax asset for $0.75 million($3 million x 25%). 【解释存在可抵扣暂时 性差异4.5m, 为什么只能确认0.75m 的 DTA, 而不能全额确认DTA】

13. Deferred tax assets and liabilities must be recognised gross in the statement of financial position.However,it may be possible to offset the deferred tax assets and the deferred tax liabilities if there is a legally enforceable right to offset the current income tax assets against current income tax liabilities as the amounts relate to income tax levied by the same taxation authority on the same taxable entity.【这段在讲 presentation,DTL 和 DTA 一般都是直接 列示在报表上，满足特殊的条件才可以以净额列示】

14. After the enactment of a new tax law,when material,Holls should consider disclosing the anticipated current and future impact on their results of operations,financial position, liquidity,and capital resources.In addition,Holls should consider disclosures in the critical accounting estimates section of the management commentary to the extent the changes could materially affect existing assumptions used in making estimates of tax-related balances. Changes in tax laws and rates may affect recorded deferred tax assets and liabilities and the effective tax rate in the future.【这段在讲关于所得税的披露问题，从明年开始税率会变， 那么今年要不要披露相关信息。】

Q4 a) 本题是首先是需要让考生辨析2010年版理论框架和2015年理论框架(征求意见稿一该 征求意见稿已经正式于2018年发布，即2018年版理论框架)中对于资产/负债确认条件的 差 异 。(Note:ED 已不在SBR 考纲范围内，因此本题涉及ED的部分可以略过) 同时题目还要求去探讨在IAS 12和IAS 37下对于相关资产/负债的确认条件与2010年版理论 框架中确认条件的不一致性，以及哪些科目在企业并购下是可以确认在报表中。 解答： (i) 在2010年版公布的理论框架中对于资产和负债类科目的确认条件定义为：相关科目 首先要符合资产或者负债的定义；该科目会很有可能导致公司未来经济利益的流入 或流出；该科目相关的金额能够被公司可靠计量。 而在2015年理论框架征求意见稿中规定了对于相关资产或负债科目确认条件更改 为：该科目需要符合相关资产或者负债的定义；同时公司能够提供出该科目相关/ 可靠的信息，并且能够将信息公正公允的呈现给报表的使用者。同时在确认条件中 要遵循成本收益原则，即获得该信息的成本不得高于该信息对外公布给公司带来的 收益。 两者之间的区别只要在于经济利益流入/流出的可能性和科目金额计量，国际会计准 则委员会认为如果相关科目引起未来经济利益流入/流出的可能性(概率)相对较低 的情况，那么此时相关科目就不需要确认在报表中(入表),取而代之是可以披露 在附注中。同时如果科目金额的计量不确定性也相对较高的话，那么也是不需要确 认在报表中。 (ii) 在IAS 12下，递延所得税负债的确认是基于企业当期产生了应纳税暂时性差异，而 对于递延所得税资产的确认是基于可抵扣暂时性差异，而确认因可抵扣暂时性差异 产生的递延所得税资产应该以未来期间可能取得的应纳税所得额为限(也就是说企 业必须要确保在未来能够产生足额的应纳税利润来去使用/递减该可抵扣暂时性差 异)。在此对于递延所得税资产的确认是考虑到未来应纳税利润的可能性，但是对 于负债并未涉及到可能性(因为递延所得税负债就是基于应纳税暂时性差异)。因 此对于递延所得税负债的确认就会有别于2010版的理论框架。 在 IAS 37下规定了如果某项事件引起未来流入公司经济利益是virtually certain(可能 性超过95%以上),那么该项事件就可以入表确认为一项资产；若该事项引起经济 利益流入的可能性是probable (可能性在50%-95%),此时该事件是不可以入表确 认，而需要披露在附注中作为或有资产。但是对于预计负债来说，只要经济利益流 出的概率是probable就可以在资产负债表中进行确认。因此对于资产确认的概率往 往会高于对于负债的确认。 其次在合并层面，母公司收购子公司的对价中包含了一项或有对价 (Contingent consideration), 该笔或有对价其实无论未来经济利益流出概率是多少，都会在母公 司报表中确认为一项负债。同时如果子公司被收购的时候，附注中有一笔或有负债， 那么该笔或有负债站在合并层面是要直接确认为一项负债，因此在此也不会去考虑 经济利益流出的概率。 b) 本题背景是一个软件开发公司提供数据托管/处理等专业服务。但同时该公司也提供线上 的存货管理系统以及售卖一些硬件设施。题目考查的是该公司提供的两套软件包：Olnventory 和 InventoryX 中的产品或服务根据IFRS 15 应该做出何种处理，并在报表中应该如何列示。 解答： (i) 针对于题中所呈现的信息，公司对于上述合同的确认要依据IFRS 15五步法中的前两 步，即第一步：识别与客户间签订的合约和第二步：识别出该合同中不同的履约义 务。在第一步中，结合案例需要考虑的是公司是很有可能收回该合同中的对价，以 确保合同是一份有效合约。其次在第二步中，要确保合同中所提的商品/服务是很独 特，这样才可以将相关产品/服务作为单项履约义务来处理。 而提供的商品/服务是否独特主要是基于两个层面进行判断， 一是：客户能够从该商 品本身或者从该商品与其他易于获得的资源一起使用中受益，即该商品本身能够明确 区分。二是：企业向客户转让该商品的承诺与合同中其他承诺可单独区分，即转让该 商品的承诺在合同中是可明确区分的。 (ii) 在0 Inventory 软件包中，提供了相关数据处理硬件，相关数据处理服务和数据托管 服务，而这些产品和服务客户均可以单独去采购(公司也可以单独进行出售),并 且相关产品和服务客户均可以单独去使用，即商品和服务间并不存在高度关联性。 因此根据IFRS 15,针对于0 Inventory 软件包出售给客户时，就可以识别出有三个履 约义务。 对于Inventory X来说，硬件的出售必须要配套相关专业服务和数据托管服务才可以 使用，换句话说客户是不可以单独去使用该硬件(必须要结合相关服务才可使用)。 但相关专业服务公司是经常单独出售的并视为是一项独特的服务。因此在Inventory X 中，是可以识别出来两个履约义务。即硬件和数据托管服务作为一个履约义务， 专业服务作为一个履约义务。 现在公司觉得将业务拓展到一个刚刚遭受经济萧条的区域，现在公司和客户签订了 一份价值为3m 的合约，但是在合同开始时，公司预计只能收到80%的合同对价。 在 IFRS 15的五步法中的第一步就明确规定了， 一份有效的合约需要确保公司很有可 能会收回合同的对价格，因此对于该合同交易的价格确认就应该按照3m*80%=2.4m 来确认，以避免高估企业当期的收入。

Q1 Background Luploid Co is the parent company of a group undergoing rapid expansion through acquisition.Luploid Co has acquired two subsidiaries in recent years,Colyson Co and Hammond Co.The current financial year end is 30 June 20X8. 题干
explanation_zh: Acquisition of Colyson Co Luploid Co acquired 80%of the five million equity shares($1 each)of Colyson Co on 1 July 20X4 for cash of $90 million.The fair value of the non-controlling interest(NCI)at acquisition was $22 million.The fair value of the identifiable net assets at acquisition was $65 million,excluding the following asset.Colyson Co purchased a factory site several years prior to the date of acquisition.Land and property prices in the area had increased significantly in the years immediately prior to 1 July 20X4. Nearby sites had been acquired and converted into residential use.It is felt that,should the Colyson Co site also be converted into residential use,the factory site would have a market value of $24 million.$1million of costs are estimated to be required to demolish the factory and to obtain planning permission for the conversion. Colyson Co was not intending to convert the site at the acquisition date and had not sought planning permission at that date.The depreciated replacement cost of the factory at 1 July 20X4 has been correctly calculated as$17·4 million. 公司年底是x8 年 6 月 3 0 号 。L 公司在x4.7.1买了80%的股权， 一共是5m 的 shares, 所以是买了4m, 现金对价支付出去90m, 收购日当天NCI 的 FV 是 2 2m, 子公司净资产的FV 是 6 5m, 同时还需要做 公允价值调整。 收购日前好几年的时候，买了个工厂，同时土地和房地产的价格最近涨势凶猛。 Nearby sites 附近的这 些厂房都已经转成了住宅用途(看到用途转换要能联想到，考官想考的是最佳用途假设)。如果C 公 司把现有的site 也转成residential use,那么这个厂房的市场价值是24块钱，但是如果要转的话，还需 要支付1块钱的转换成本，这个1块钱包括demolish这个工厂以及要去拿到一个相关的许可。 C 公司并不打算转变用途，但是IFRS 13号准则的规定说的是，公允价值是站在整个市场使用者、参与 者的角度，来进行定价的，也就是market specific我们是以市场为导向的，所以公司的意愿不重要，无 论你转还是不转，当评定下来residential use 才 是highest and best use的时候，那么就应该按照此类用途 对应的公允价值来计量这个厂房。 Requirement解析： Draft an explanatory note to the directors of Luploid Co,addressing the following: (a)(i)How the fair value of the factory site should be determined at 1 July 20X4 and why the depreciated replacement cost of $17·4 million is unlikely to be a reasonable estimate of fair value.(7marks) (ii)A calculation of goodwill arising on the acquisition of Colyson Co measuring the non-controlling interest at: -fair value; -proportionate share of the net assets.(3 marks) 确定工厂厂房的公允价值以及为什么这个17.4的DRC 不可以作为工厂房厂的公允价值。7分考的都是 13号准则下最佳用途假设的知识点。接着第二小问，纯计算题，根据商誉的两种不同的计算方法来计 算一下商誉。 答案解析： IFRS®13 Fair Value Measurement permits a range of valuation methods to estimate fair value including market based,income estimates and a cost-based approach.However,the characteristics of each asset should be considered when determining the most appropriate methodology. Fair value is defined as the price which would be received to sell an asset or paid to transfer a liability in an orderly transaction between market participants at the measurement date.Fair value is therefore not supposed to be entity specific but rather to be market focused. The estimate consequently should consider what the market would be prepared to pay for the asset. 点 出FV 的定义，并指出FV 不 是以公司为主，而是以市场为导向的。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM The market would consider all alternative uses for the assessment of the price which they would be willing to pay.Fair value should therefore be measured by consideration of the highest and best use of the asset.There is a presumption that the current use would be the highest and best use. The highest and best use of the asset would appear to be as residential property and not the current industrial use.The intentions of Colyson Co are not relevant as fair value is not entity specific.The alternative use would need to be based upon fair and reasonable assumptions.In particular,it would be necessary to ensure that planning permission to demolish the factory and convert into residential properties would be likely.Since several nearby sites have been given such permission,this would appear to be the case. 点出关键词物尽其用假设，同时物尽其用假设需要满足三个条件： physically possible,legally permissible and financially feasible.也就是对于一个实物资产去考虑定价的时候，是站在一个最佳的使用角度对于 这个资产进行定价，而且要能够满足物理上的可能性，法律上的不禁止以及财务上的可行性，同时如 果没有其他特别的证据可以证明其他用途更好，则这个资产的current use就 是bestt use。但所有的分析 都是站在整个市场的角度，而不是某个公司或个人。 The fair value of the factory site should be valued as if converted into residential use.Since this cannot be determined on a stand-alone basis,the combined value of the land and buildings is calculated.The $1 million demolition and planning costs should be deducted from the market value of $24 million.The fair value of the land and buildings should be $23 million.The fair value of the identifiable net assets at acquisition are $88 million($65m+$23m). 接着点出站在市场参与者的角度，住宅用途其实看起来是满足物尽其用假设的，因为他们已经转换了 用途就说明获得这个许可是没有问题的，也就是法律上的不禁止是满足的，所以此时公司的意图是不 相关的，因为是以市场为准而不是entity specific。答题时不需要把物尽其用假设那三个条件每个都拆 开详细分析，只要结合case, 把题目相关的那些条件去分析一下就可以了。 接着计算，1块钱要减掉，最终厂房的公允价值是23。因为准则要求如果资产的用途发生改变的话， 所有的转换成本都要考虑进去。同时，资产的公允价值增加了23,说明子公司的账面净资产考虑完公 允价值调整之后是88块钱。 Depreciated replacement cost should only be considered as a possible method for estimating the fair value of the asset when other more suitable methods are not available.This may be the case when the asset is highly specialised and market data is therefore limited or unavailable.This is not the case with the factory site. In any case,the rise in value of land and properties particularly for residential use would mean that to use depreciated replacement cost would undervalue the asset.The exit value for the asset,whether it was based on the principal or most advantageous market,would need to be the same as the entry price.Depreciation may not also be an accurate reflection of all forms of obsolescence including physical deterioration.The estimate would need to be adjusted for such factors even where industrial use remained the best use of the asset. DRC 其实只有在市场信息缺失的时候才会去使用，所以市场价值在上升，23跟17.4肯定是按照23来 确认价值，这也就意味着按照DRC 的方法确认是会低估资产的。 (ii) Goodwill should be calculated as follows: Consideration Non-controlling interest(NCI)at acquisition Net assets at acquisition Goodwill Fair value method $millions 90 22 (88) 24 Proportional method $millions 90 17·6 (88) 19·6 NCI at acquisition under proportional method is $17·6m(20%x$88m). The fair value of the net assets at acquisition is $88m as per part a(i)($65m+$23m). 答案解析： Full goodwill 还有partial goodwill计算，直接套公式就行。 题干解析： Impairment of Colyson Co Colyson Co incurred losses during the year ended 30 June 20X8 and an impairment review was performed. The recoverable amount of Colyson Co's assets was estimated to be $100 million.Included in this assessment was the only building owned by Colyson Co which had been damaged in a storm and impaired to the extent of $4 million.The carrying amount of the net assets of Colyson Co at 30 June 20X8(including fair value adjustments on acquisition but excluding goodwill)are as follows: $millions Land and buildings 60 Other plant and machinery 15 Intangibles other than goodwill 9 Current assets(recoverable amount) 22 Total 106 None of the assets of Colyson Co including goodwill have been impaired previously.Colyson Co does not have a policy of revaluing its assets. C 公司要做个减值测试。 Recoverable amount是100,有 一 个building是 直 接damage 了，减值的程度达 到了4m, 换言之其实就是这栋楼减值了4m。C 公司的账面价值包含了公允价值调整的，但是没有包 含商誉。 Requirement解析： (b)Discuss the calculation and allocation of Colyson Co's impairment loss at 30 June 20X8 and why the impairment loss of Colyson Co would differ depending on how non-controlling interests are measured.Your answer should include a calculation and an explanation of how the impairments would impact upon the consolidated financial statements of Luploid Co.(11 marks) 讨论一下减值损失的计算以及分配，同时解释一下不同的NCI 计量方式，计算出来的减值不同。主要 就解释下为什么 full goodwill和 partial goodwill 的方法下，我们计算出来的减值损失不同(差异集中在 nominal goodwill) 。 考官要求答案里包含计算并解释一下这个减值对于合并报表的影响有哪些。 答案解析： An impairment arises where the carrying amount of the net assets exceeds the recoverable amount.Where there is a clear indication of impairment,this asset should be reduced to the recoverable amount. 写出减值的定义。 Where the cash flows cannot be independently determined for individual assets,they should be assessed as a cash generating unit.That is the smallest group of assets which independently generate cash flows. Impairments of cash generating units are allocated first to goodwill and then pro rata on the other assets.It should be noted that no asset should be reduced below its recoverable amount. 子公司减值损失分配，势必要提一下CGU 的概念及减值损失分配顺序。 Fair value method The overall impairment of Colyson Co is $30 million($106m+goodwill $24m -$100m).The damaged building should be impaired by $4 million with a corresponding charge to profit or loss.Since $4 million has already been allocated to the land and buildings,$26 million remains.The goodwill should therefore be written off and expensed in the consolidated statement of profit or loss. Fullgoodwill的计算过程论述。 Of the remaining $2 million,$1-25 million willbe allocated to the plant and machinery(15/(15+9)x2m)and $0·75 million will be allocated to the remaining intangibles(9/(9+15)x 2m).As no assets have been previously revalued,all the impairments are charged to profit or loss.$24 million(80%x $30m)will be attributable to the owners of Luploid Co and $6 million to the NCI in the consolidated statement of comprehensive income. 减值损失分配顺序论述，并进行相应计算。 The allocation of the impairment is summarised in this table: Original value$mImpairment$mRevised CV$mLand and buildings6056Plant and machinery151·2513·75Intangibles other than goodwil90·758·25Goodwill24240Current assets(at recoverable amount)22O22TotalE130 CATION30100 Original value $m Impairment $m Revised CV $m Land and buildings 60 56 Plant and machinery 15 1·25 13·75 Intangibles other than goodwil 9 0·75 8·25 Goodwill 24 24 0 Current assets(at recoverable amount) 22 O 22 Total E130 CATION 30 100 Proportionate method The basic principles and rule for impairment is the same as the fair value method and so $4 million will again first be written off against the land and buildings.The problems arise when performing the impairment review as a cash generating unit. When NCI is measured using the proportional share of net assets,no goodwill is attributable to the NCI since goodwill is not included within the individual net assets of the subsidiary. This means that the goodwill needs to be grossed up when an impairment review is performed so that it is comparable with the recoverable amount.Under the fair value method,the NCI fully represents any premium the other shareholders would be prepared to pay for the net assets and so goodwill does not need to be grossed up. 论 述partial goodwill的计算方法，并重点点出此方法下NCI 身上是没有goodwill 的 。 The goodwill of $19·6million is grossed up by 100/80 to a value of $24·5 million.This extra $4·9million is known as notional goodwill.The overall impairment is now $30-5 million($106m +$24·5m-$100m)of which $4 million has already been allocated.Since the remaining impairment of $26·5 million exceeds the value of goodwill,the goodwill is written down to zero.However,as only $19·6 million goodwill is recognised within the consolidated accounts,the impairment attributable to the notional goodwill is not recognised.Only $19·6million is deducted in full from the owners of Luploid Co's share of profits since there is no goodwill attributable to the non-controlling interest.The remaining $2 million impairment is allocated between plant and machinery and intangibles (other than goodwill).NCI will be allocated 20%of $6m($4m+ $2m),i.e.$1·2million. 论述减值损失分配顺序，比郭店楚NCI 因为不用考虑商誉，所以NC I承担的是除商誉以外的6m 的减 值影响，剩余的都是母公司需要承担的。 Consolidated retained earnings will be charged with 80%of $6m(i.e.$4·8m)plus $19·6 million goodwill impairment(i.e.$24·4m in total).The allocation of the impairment is summarised in this table: Original carrying Impairment Revised carrying amount amount $m $m $m Land and buildings 60 4 56 Plant and machinery 15 1·25 13·75 Intangibles other than goodwill 9 0·75 8·25 Goodwill 19·6 19·6 0 (Notional goodwill) 4·9 4·9 0 Current assets(at recoverable amount) 22 22 Total 130·5 30·5 100 Gross up还 原 出 来 的notional goodwill 纯粹是为了辅助计算的。因为 partial 方 法 下NCI 是 没 有 商 誉 的 ， 但是子公司减值是比较子公司百分百的账面价值跟百分百的recoverable amount, 所以这里先还原成 100%,接着通过比较发现减值了305,有了减值之后，还是按照同样的分配顺序先分有damaged, 再 给 goodwill,接着按照占比对于NCA 进行分配。同时4.9因为是名义上的，纯粹为了辅助计算，最终 是不记账的，换言之最终的账面价值是最后 一 栏的数字。 题 干 解 析 ： Acquisition of Hammond Co Luploid Co acquired 60%of the 10 million equity shares of Hammond Co on 1 July 20X7.Two Luploid Co shares are to be issued for every five shares acquired in Hammond Co.These shares will be issued on 1 July 20X8.The fair value of a Luploid Co share was $30 at 1 July 20X7.Hammond Co had previously granted a share-based payment to its employees with a three-year vesting period. At 1 July 20X7,the employees had completed their service period but had not yet exercised their options.The fair value of the options granted at 1 July 20X7 was $15 million.As part of the acquisition,Luploid Co is obliged to replace the share-based payment scheme of Hammond Co with a scheme of its own which has the following details: L 公司在x7.7.1收购了H 公司一共10m 的60%的股份，对价采取以股换股的方式，每2股换对方子公 司 的 5 股 ， 一 共 发 行2 ·4 million(60%x10mx2/5) 。但 是 发 行 时 间 是 在 1 年 以 后 ， 这 是 一 个deferred shares 递延对价的概念，但是因为收购合并时，所有的对价准则要求按照收购日当天的对价的公允价值计量， 收购日这天母公司每股股价是30块钱，2.4m*30得到72m 的收购对价。 H 公司收购前有一个3年期的期权计划的，在收购日这天，员工已经完成了3年的服务年限，满足行 权条件，但是都没有行权，期权的公允价值是15块钱。作为收购的一部分L 公司有义务用新的期权计 划去替换掉子公司原本的期权计划。且行权日期为收购的两年后。在这两年中，员工需要持续为公司 提供服务，行权日时，公司的股价要上涨10%。 Luploid Co issued 100 options to each of Hammond Co's 10,000 employees on 1 July 20X7.The shares are conditional on the employees completing a further two years of service.Additionally,the scheme required that the market price of Luploid Co's shares had to increase by 10%from its value of $30 per share at the acquisition date over the vesting period.It was anticipated at 1 July 20X7 that 10%of staff would leave over the vesting period but this was revised to 4%by 30 June 20X8.The fair value of each option at the grant date was $20.The share price ofLuploid Co at 30 June 20X8 was $32 and is anticipated to grow at a similar rate in the year ended 30 June 20X9. 替换内容：L 公司在收购日这一天，向H 公 司 1w 名员工每人发了100个期权，但是行权条件是这些 员工必须再额外提供2年的服务，相当于原来的3年延期到了5年。同时还要求母公司的股价从收购 日开始的2年内要在现在30块钱的基础之上提高10%。所以这个行权条件既有service condition 又有 performance condition。但是跟股价相关的条件属于我们的市场条件，这块是忽略不计的，因为市场条 件在计量确定授予日公允价值的时候，其实将股价变动影响考虑进行了，所以在计算的时候市场条件 默认满足，忽略不计。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 预计20X7 年7月1日，10%的员工将在归属期内离职，但20X8 年6月30日，这一比例被修订为4%。 每项期权在授予日的公允价值为20美元，这是一个典型的equity settled, 题，题目没有其他特别的条 件说是cash settled, 所以按照equity settled 的计算公式来做就可以。L 公司在20X8年6月30日的股 价为32美元，预计在截至20X9 年6月30日(行权日),股价增长率保持一致的。即使没达到，我们 还是忽略不计，照常计提就可以了。 (c)(i) How the consideration for the acquisition of Hammond Co should be measured on 1 July 20X7.Your answer should include a calculation of the consideration and a discussion of why only some of the cost of the replacement share-based payment scheme should be included within the consideration.(4 marks) (ii) How much of an expense for the share-based payment scheme should be recognised in the consolidated profit or loss ofLuploid Co for the year ended 30 June 20X8. Your answer should include a brief discussion of how the vesting conditions impact upon the calculations.(5 marks) Note:Any workings can either be shown in the main body of the explanatory note or in an appendix to the explanatory note. Requirement解析： C问一共包含了两小问： 第一问：H 公司的收购对价该怎么去算，同时要求答案里既要有计算，也要有讨论(讨论为什么只有 部分的share-based payment可以被包含进对价里)。价值4分。 第二问：股份支付里有多少是作为费用要确认进利润表里的。这里还要求大致讨论下行权条件对于计 算有什么影响。 答案解析： (i)IFRS 3 Business Combinations requires all consideration to be measured at fair value on acquisition of a subsidiary.This will include the deferred shares.Since Luploid Co is obliged to replace the share-based scheme of Hammond Co on acquisition,the replacement scheme should also be included as consideration. There is,however,a post combination service period which means that the portion of the replacement scheme attributable to pre-combination service is the market value of the acquiree award multiplied by the ratio of the portion of the vesting period completed to the greater of the total vesting period or the original vesting period of the acquiree award. The vesting period of the acquiree award had vested and was three years.As there is a two-year post combination vesting period,the total vesting period is five years.Therefore the amount attributable to the pre-combination period (and therefore added to the cost of the investment)should be $15 million x3/5=$9 million. Deferred shares should be measured at the fair value at the acquisition date with subsequent changes in fair value ignored.Luploid Co will issue 2·4million(60%x10mx2/5)shares as consideration.The market price at the date of acquisition was $30,so the fair value is $72 million.The total consideration should be valued as $81 million(72+9). ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM (ii)The fair value of the replacement scheme at the grant date is $18 million(100x10,000x 90%x $20) Since $9 million has been allocated to the cost of the investment,the remaining $9 million should be treated as part of the post combination remuneration package for the employees and measured in accordance with IFRS 2 Share-based Payment. The fair value at the grant date of the share-based scheme should be expensed to profit or loss over the two-year vesting period.Subsequent changes to the fair value of the shares are ignored.Luploid Co will need to consider the impact of market and non-market based vesting conditions.The condition relating to the share price of Luploid Co is a market based vesting condition.These are adjusted for in the calculation of the fair value at the grant date of the option.An expense is therefore recorded in the consolidated profit or loss of Luploid Co irrespective of whether the market based vesting condition is met or not.A corresponding credit should be included within equity. 本题的考点在于并购过程中，若收购方有义务替换原股东给子公司员工的期权，那期权对价如何进行 会计处理。根据IFRS 3规定，收购过程中，若收购方要用新的期权替换掉被收购方原本授予给员工的 股份支付计划(期权),且等待期延长，员工需继续为公司提供服务，该新期权实际上应拆分为两部 分，一部分作为收购对价，是在买收购日这天的子公司，另一部分期权，则是在买并购后员工在后续 等待期内的服务，是职工薪酬。 确定新期权价值中，有多少是在买并购前的子公司，有多少是在买并购后的员工服务，需要根据公式 来计算：Purchase consideration=FV of the old option*completed vesting period/(higher of original period & total vesting period)① 即算出在收购日这一天，旧期权在全部等待期中，已完成的等待期的价值，该部分计入收购对价，是 在买收购前的子公司。而剩下的部分FV of new option-purchase consideration①才是在真正去买并购之 后员工的服务，才是新股东对员工的让利，计入合并后集团的费用。且遵循IFRS2 号准则，该部分费 用在后续两年等待期内逐年确认。 【知识拓展】 2.1 2.1.1 IFRS3.B56 IFRS3.B56 IFRS 3.30 IFRS3.B56 Replacement awards expected to meet service conditions Accounting principles In some circumstances the acquirer is obliged to issue replacement awards to employees of an acquiree in exchange for share-based payment awards issued previously by the acquiree.Such exchanges are accounted for as modifications of share-based payment awards under IFRS 2,and all or a portion of the amount of the acquirer's replacement awards is included in measuring the consideration transferred in the business combnation. An acquirer is obliged to issue replacement awards if the acquiree or its employees are able to enforce replacement.Such obligations may arise from various sources,including: ● the terms of the acquisition agreement; ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM● the terms of the acquiree's lawards;orUC ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM ● applicable laws or regulations. Measurement Share-based payment awards are an exception to the fair value measurement principle of IFRS3. This exception requires that such awards be measured at the acquisition date in accordance with IFRS 2 and refers to the amounts so determinedas the "market-based measure"of the awards. This applies regardless of whether the market-based measurement of replacement awards is included in measuring the consideration transferred in a business combination,or is recognised as remuneration cost in the post-combination financial statements. Attribution In some instances a portion of the value of the replacement awards is allocated to post- combination service and accounted for separately from the business combination.This is the case, for example,when post-combination service is required to be rendered by the employees of the acquiree in connection with the acquirer issuing replacement awards or when the market-based measure of the replacement awards exceeds the market-based measure of the acquiree awards. The amount of the market-based measure of the replacement awards treated as consideration transferred is determined in the following manner: 1.Determine at the acquisition date,in accordance with the market-based measurement method in IFRS 2:● the market-based measure of the acquiree's awards (FVa);and● the market-based measure of the replacement awards (FVr).2.Determine:● the period for which services have been provided by the employees prior to theacquisition date,i.e.the pre-combination vesting period (see A in the following diagram);● the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards (see B in the following diagram);● the post-combination vesting period,if any,for the replacement awards (see C in the following diagram);and● the greater of the total vesting period (the sum of Aplus C)and the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards(B). 1.Determine at the acquisition date,in accordance with the market-based measurement method in IFRS 2: ● the market-based measure of the acquiree's awards (FVa);and ● the market-based measure of the replacement awards (FVr). 2.Determine: ● the period for which services have been provided by the employees prior to the acquisition date,i.e.the pre-combination vesting period (see A in the following diagram); ● the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards (see B in the following diagram); ● the post-combination vesting period,if any,for the replacement awards (see C in the following diagram);and ● the greater of the total vesting period (the sum of Aplus C)and the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards(B). Grant date ofacquiree awardsAcquisition date Vesting date of (original)acquiree awardsVesting date ofreplacement awardsA 高顿教育GOLDEN EDUCATIOCThe diagram illustrates a situation in which the total period of A plus C is longer than B.Inpractice,the total vesting period of the original awards may be longer than the sum of the pre- combination vesting period plus the post-combination vesting period of the replacement awards.3.Calculate the portion of the replacement awards attributable to pre-combination service as the product of:● the market-based measure of the acquiree's awards at the acquisition date;and● the ratio of the pre-combination vesting period to the greater of the total vesting period and the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards.ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Grant date of acquiree awards Acquisition date Vesting date of (original) acquiree awards Vesting date of replacement awards A 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATIOC The diagram illustrates a situation in which the total period of A plus C is longer than B.In practice,the total vesting period of the original awards may be longer than the sum of the pre- combination vesting period plus the post-combination vesting period of the replacement awards. 3.Calculate the portion of the replacement awards attributable to pre-combination service as the product of: ● the market-based measure of the acquiree's awards at the acquisition date;and ● the ratio of the pre-combination vesting period to the greater of the total vesting period and the original vesting period of the acquiree's awards. ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM IFRS3.B59Any remaining amount of the market-based measure of the replacement awards afterdeducting the amount attributed to consideration transferred is treated as post-combination remuneration cost. IFRS3.B59 Any remaining amount of the market-based measure of the replacement awards after deducting the amount attributed to consideration transferred is treated as post-combination remuneration cost. IFRS3.B61 These requirements for determining the portions of a replacement awards attributable to pre- combination and post-combination service apply equally regardless of whether the replacement awards are classified as cash-settled or as equity-settled in accordance with IFRS 2. The above process demonstrates several points: ● The acquirer measures both the replacement awards given to employees by the acquirer and the acquiree awards at the acquisition date.The measurement and attribution of replacement awards issued in a business combination are independent of the original grant-date value of the acquiree awards. ● IFRS3 sets two limits on the amount of the replacement awards'value that is included in the consideration transferred: -the amount cannot exceed the market-based measure at the acquisition date of the acquiree awards;and -the amount includes only the value attributed to pre-combination service. · Any incremental value of the replacement awards over the value of the acquiree awards at the acquisition date is attributed to post-combination service and is not part of the consideration transferred,even if all service has been rendered as of the acquisition date.In this case,the excess value is recognised immediately as remuneration cost in the post-combination financial statements of the combined entity.If additional service is required,then the remuneration cost is recognised in the post-combination financial statements by applying the requirements of IFRS 2. ● Even if acquiree awards are fully vested at the time of a business combination,a portion of the replacement awards is allocated to post-combination service if the acquiree's employees are required to render service in the post-combination period for the replacement awards to vest.

stem_zh: Q3 Background Digiwire Co has developed a new business model whereby it sells music licences to other companies which then deliver digital music to consumers. Revenue:sale of three-year licence Digiwire Co has agreed to sell Clamusic Co,an unlisted technology start-up company,a three-year licence to sell Digiwire Co's catalogue of classical music to the public.This catalogue contains a large selection of classical music which Digiwire Co will regularly update over the three-year period. As revenue for the three-year licence,Clamusic Co has issued shares to Digiwire Co equivalent to a 7% shareholding.Voting rights are attached to these shares.Digiwire Co received the shares in Clamusic Co on 1 January 20X6,which is the first day of the licence term. Digiwire Co will also receive a royalty of5%of future revenue sales of Clamusic Co as revenue for the licence. 题干
explanation_zh: 收入-三年期牌照的销售 Digiwire Co已同意出售给未上市的科技初创公司Clamusic Co一个三年期的许可牌照，持有该牌照可 允许Clamusic Co向公众出售Digiwire Co的数字版古典音乐。这个目录包含了大量的古典音乐可供选 择 ，D igiwire Co将在三年内定期更新。 作为销售该三年牌照的收入，Clamusic Co 已经向Digiwire Co发行了相当于7%的股份。这些股份都附 带了投票权。Digiwire Co于20X1年1月1日，收到Clamusic Co的股份。 Digiwire Co还将获得Clamusic Co未来销售收入的5%的特许权使用费，作为许可证的收入。 分析：第一段很明显是考察的IFRS15 revenue的相关知识点。具体考察的是无形资产知识版权的销售。 Clamusic Co valuation and revenue On 1 January 20X6,Clamusic Co was valued at between $4-$5million by a professional valuer who used a market-based approach.The valuation was based on the share price of a controlling interest in a comparable listed company. For the financial year end of 31 December 20X6,sales of the classical music were $1 million.At 31 December 20X6,a further share valuation report had been produced by the same professional valuer which indicated that Clamusic Co was valued in the region of $6-$7million. 题干解析： Clamusic Co估值和收入 20X6 年 1 月 1 日 ，C lamusic Co的估值在400-500万至500万美元之间。该估值是基于一家可比上市公 司的控股权的股价。 在20X6 年12月31日结束的财政年度中， C lamusic Co的销售额为100万美元。截至20X6 年 1 2 月 3 1 日，同一专业评估师又提交了一份股票估值报告，报告显示Clamusic Co的估值在600万至700万美元 之 间 。 分析：因为收入有股权，而股权对应的公司是非上市公司，所以没有直接的股票市场的交易价格作为 公允价值。只能借用类似的上市公司的股价，来计算该股权价值。这里考核的就是估值计算方法。 Investment in FourDee Co Digiwire Co has agreed to work with TechGame Co to develop a new music platform.On 31 December 20X6, the companies created a new entity,FourDee Co,with equal shareholdings and shares in profit.Digiwire Co has contributed its own intellectual property in the form of employee expertise,cryptocurrency with a carrying amount of $3 million (fair value of $4 million)and an office building with a carrying amount of $6 million (fair value of$10 million).The cryptocurrency has been recorded at cost in Digiwire Co's financial statements. TechGame Co has contributed the technology and marketing expertise The board of FourDee Co will comprise directors appointed equally by Digiwire Co and TechGame Co.Decisions are made by a unanimous vote. UCATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM 题干解析：对FourDee Co的投资 Digiwire Co 已同意与TechGame Co合作开发一个新的音乐平台。在20X6 年12月31日，公司创建了 一个新的实体，FourDeeCo, 投资方对该公司拥有同等的股份和利润。 DigiwireCo 以员工专业知识的形 式贡献了自己的知识产权、账面价值300万美元(公允价值400万美元)的加密货币和账面价值600 万美元(公允价值1000万美元)的办公大楼。 这种加密货币已按成本记录在 Digiwire Co的财务报表中。 TechGame Co贡献了技术和营销专业知识。 FourDeeCo 的董事会将由 Digiwire Co和 TechGame Co平等任命的董事组成。决定是通过一致投票作 出 的 。 分 析：凡是看到题目提到投资方的投资股份和收益均分，就要马上想到这是涉及到 IFRS11 joint arrangement 的知识点。要判断是否应按照IFRS11 进行确认和计量。 Pension plan Digiwire Co provides a pension plan for its employees.From 1 September 20X6,Digiwire Co decided to curtail the plan and to limit the number of participants.The employees were paid compensation from the plan assets and some received termination benefits due to redundancy.Due to the curtailment,the current monthly service cost changed from $9 million to $6 million.The relevant financial information relating to the plan is as follows: Date 1 January 20X6 1 September 20X6 31 December 20X6 Net defined liability ($m) 30 36 39 Discount rate % 3 3·5 3·7 题干解析：养老金计划 Digiwire Co为其员工提供了一个养老金计划。从9月20X6 日 1 日 起 ，Digiwire Co决定缩减计划并限 制参与者的人数。这些员工从计划资产中获得了补偿， 一些人因裁员而获得了解雇福利。由于削减， 目前每月的服务费用从900万美元变为600万美元。 Requirement解析： (a)Advise the directors of Digiwire Co on the recognition and measurement of the: (i)Clamusic Co shares received as revenue for the sale of the three-year licence and how they should be accounted for in the financial statements for the year ended 31 December 20X6;and (ii)royalties which Clamusic Co has agreed to pay as revenue for the sale of the three-year licence in the financial statements for the year ended 31 December 20X6.Your answer to(a)(ii)should demonstrate how it is supported by the revised Conceptual Framework for Financial Reporting(2018).(9 marks) (a) 建议Digiwire Co的董事对下述交易如何确认和计量：ION (i)Clamusic公司股份作为出售三年牌照的收入，以及如何在截至20X6 年12月31日的财务报表中计入； 及 (ii)Clamusic公司同意在截至20x6年12月31日的财务报表中支付的三年牌照销售收入的使用费。您对 (a)(ii)的回答应该说明修订后的财务报告概念框架(2018年)是如何支持它的。(9分) 分析思路： 第一步：分配分值。(a)问合计9分，但二小问各自的分值没有告知。所以首先要根据题目内容和问题 要求对分值进行分配一般来说可以在均值左右分配。比如这里两个小问可以按4分和5分进行分配。 第二步：判断准则。会计处理相关题目，一定要结合案例和题目判断准确考核的准则。在本题我们可 以分别判断出涉及的是 IFRS15 和会计准则基本框架。 第三步：判断考核对应准则的哪个考点。一般来说，准则考点为定义，初始确认，初始计量，后续计 量，终止确认这几个点。考核要么选取其中一个来考，要么综合进行考核。本题我们可以发现(i)IFRS15 考核的重点是五步法。这里考核的是第三步和第五步；(ii)同样考核的是第三步和第五步。 按上述步骤分析完毕后，再开始答题，才有效率。 答案解析： (a)(i)Revenue recognition:Clamusic Co shares IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers requires that non-cash consideration received should be measured at the fair value of the consideration received. 点出考点，因为收的是股权，不是现金，所以是第三步非现金对价的考点，要谈到非现金对价用收到 日 的FV 这一基本规则。 If fair value cannot be reasonably estimated,the consideration should be measured by reference to the stand-alone selling price of the good or service promised in the contract. FV 不能可靠计量就要想办法估值 The fair value of non-cash consideration may vary.If the non-cash consideration varies for reasons other than the form of the consideration,entities will apply the guidance in IFRS 15 related to constraining variable consideration.However,if fair value varies only due to the form,the variable constraint guidance in IFRS 15 would not apply.In this case,the fair value varies due to the form of the consideration which is equity shares and therefore the variable constraint guidance in IFRS 15 does not apply. 非现金对价是否涉及可变对价。因为本合同没有约定一个条件，这个条件是否达成会影响股权交割的 数量。所以该合同下，股权交割的数量是不变的。所以不涉及非现金对价的问题。 The fair valuation of shares in an unlisted start-up company is problematic.However,IFRS 13 Fair Value Measurement gives advice on howto measure unlisted shares.It sets out three approaches:(i)market approach,such as the transaction price paid for identical or similar instruments of an investee;(ii)the income approach,for example,using discounted cash flow;and (ii)the adjusted net asset approach. FV 不能可靠计量时，如何用估值方法来估值。 In this case,the market approach has been used and the range of fair values is significant based upon the professional valuation report.The range of fair values for a 7%holding of shares would be $280,000 to $350,000(7%of $4-$5 million)at the date of the contract and $420,000 to $490,000(7%of $6-$7 million)at the year end.As the fair valuation is based upon a similar listed company and is based upon a controlling interest,a discount on the valuation of the shares should be applied to reflect the lack of liquidity and inability to participate in Digiwire Co's policy decisions. 估值方法在案例的应用。因为用的是上市公司有控制权的股份的价值作为参照，而作为收入收取到的 股份没有控制权，所以要适当折扣调整来反映非上市公司的股份缺乏流动性和无控制权的价值折扣。 Thus an estimated value of the shares can be made which takes into account the above facts.This could be the mid-point of $315,000($280,000+$350,000)/2)at the date of the contract and $455,000($420,000+ $490,000)/2)at the year end.Digiwire Co would therefore recognise revenue of $315,000 for the receipt of shares from Clamusic Co,as the fair value of non-cash consideration is measured at the contract inception date of 1 January 20X6. 取中位数作为FV 的基准，确认为收到股权那一天的股权对价的价值。 This revenue would not be recognised at a point in time but would be recognised over the period of the licence which is three years. 五步法第五步，先收钱，再服务的情况下，收钱的时点不能确认收入。因为题目说了三年内要定时更 新音乐。所以这是复合IFRS15收入中对于知识产权收入的确认，按over period oftime 确认的条件的。 于是先收钱，确认递延收益。再分段确认收入。 Clamusic Co share valuation at 31 December 20X6 The shares will be recognised at $455,000($420,000+$490,000)/2)at 31 December 20X6.All equity investments in scope of IFRS 9 Financial Instruments should be measured at fair value in the statement of financial position,with value changes being recognised in profit or loss.If an equity investment is not held for trading,an entity can make an irrevocable election at initial recognition to measure it at fair value through other comprehensive income(FVTOCI)with only dividend income recognised in profit or loss. 非现金对价的后续计量按照资产特性，根据对应资产类准则进行计量。这里收的是股票，就按照IFRS9 的要求，要么FVTPL , 要么FVTOCI。 If Digiwire Co elects to present the remeasurements through other comprehensive income(OCI),gains are never recycled through profit or loss.This means that,if the investment in Clamusic Co is successful,when the investment is sold,there will be no profit or loss effect since all gains will already have been recognised in OCI.Thus at the year end,a gain of$140,000($455,000-$315,000)will be recorded in profit or loss or OCI dependent upon any election being made. 如果是FVTOCI 的后续处理 (ii)Revenue:royalties As Digiwire Co retains an active role in the updating and maintenance of a sold licence to ensure its continuing value to the client,revenue would be recognised over the expected length of the contract or related client relationship. 版权费应该是按at point 还是 over time 进行确认的讨论。根据上一题的分析，应该是over time。 An entity must be expected to undertake activities which significantly affect the licence to conclude that revenue is recognised over time.However,reliable measurement of future royalties is not available(see below).Thus,in this case,the revenue would be recognised over the three-year licence based upon the licence agreement.At the year end,however,revenue from royalties can be calculated based upon the sales for the period and it would be $50,000(5%of$1million). 这里其实是五步法第三步可变对价的考点，因为版权费这里是客户使用版权费所得收入的比例来确认 版权费。那么只能在非常肯定客户所得收入的可靠数字的前提下，才能确认版权费收入的金额。这个 时刻只能是年底。所以在每年年底确认本年应得的版权费收入的金额。 The Conceptual Framework support The International Accounting Standards Board has changed the definitions of income and expenses in the revised Conceptual Framework(the Framework)to align with the revised definitions of an asset and a liability. The definition of income encompasses both revenue and gains.Revenue arises in the course of the ordinary activities of an entity and is referred to by a variety of different names including sales,fees,interest,dividends, royalties and rent.Gains represent other items which meet the definition of income and may,or may not,arise in the course of the ordinary activities ofan entity.Gains represent increases in economic benefits and,as such, are no different in nature from revenue.Hence,they are not regarded as constituting a separate element in the IFRS Framework. 基本准则会计框架的修订对会计报表五要素的定义的影响。根据本题重点讨论收入，这里分析的时候 重点谈收入。 The revised Framework also states that an item which meets the definition of an element should be recognised if: (a)it is probable that any future economic benefit associated with the item will flow to or from the entity;and (b)the item has a cost or value which can be measured with reliability. 基本准则会计框架对考会计报表五要素确认的修订 Thus,in this case,the royalties cannot be measured with any certainty in the future and should not be recognised until certain.The definitions in the Framework relating to revenue,recognition and gains are therefore consistent with the approach taken by Digiwire Co. Requirement解析： (b)Based on International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS®),advise the directors on the following: (i)the classification of the investment which Digiwire Co has in FourDee Co; (ii)the derecognition of the assets exchanged for the investment in FourDee Co and any resulting gain/loss on disposal in the financial statements of Digiwire Co at 31 December 20X6;and (iii)whether the cryptocurrency should be classified as a financial asset or an intangible asset.Your answer should also briefly consider whether fair value movements on the cryptocurrency should be recorded in profit or loss.(9 marks) (b)根据国际财务报告准则(IFRSB), 向董事提供以下建议： (i)Digiwire Co 对 FourDee 公司的投资如何分类； (ii)取消确认投资FourDee 的资产，以及在20X6 年12月31日Digiwire Co 财务报表中处置的任何损益； 及 iii)该加密货币是否应分类为金融资产或无形资产。您的回答还应该简要地考虑加密货币的公允价值变 动是否应该计入利润或亏损。(9分) 分析思路： 第一步：分配分值。(a)问合计9分，但三小问各自的分值没有告知。所以首先要根据题目内容和问题 要求对分值进行分配.一般来说可以在均值左右分配。比如这里三个小问可以按3分进行平均分配。 第二步：判断准则。会计处理相关题目， 一定要结合案例和题目判断准确考核的准则。在本题我们可 以分别判断出涉及的是 IFRS11 共同控制企业和根据current issue 对加密货币的分类判断。 第三步：判断考核对应准则的哪个考点。 一般来说，准则考点为定义，初始确认，初始计量，后续计 量，终止确认这几个点。考核要么选取其中一个来考，要么综合进行考核。本题我们可以发现(i)IFRS11 在这里考核的是如何分类，也就是共同控制企业的确认；(ii)考核的是后续计量；(iii)考核的是加密货 币的确认。 按上述步骤分析完毕后，再开始答题，才有效率。 答案解析： (b)(i)It seems that Digiwire Co and TechGame jointly control FourDee Co and it appears as though the arrangement is a joint venture(IFRS 11 Joint Arrangements)as the parties have joint control of the arrangement and have rights to the net assets of the arrangement.Joint control is the contractually agreed sharing of control of an arrangement,which exists only when decisions about the relevant activities require the unanimous consent of the parties sharing control.This is the case with FourDee Co. 首先因为案例提到是均分，所以必须讨论是否是IFRSH 共同控制协议。这里主要看有没有关键词 unanimous consent (一票否决权)。如果有，就是共同控制；如果没有，就算均分也不是。本题有，所 以是共同控制协议。 A joint venturer recognises its interest in a joint venture as an investment and accounts for that investment using the equity method in accordance with IAS 28 Investments in Associates and Joint Ventures unless the entity is exempted. 接下来讨论共同控制的类型。因为案例有提到成立一个entity,凡是成立独立的法人，一般都属于JV 共 同控制企业。共同控制企业用权益法进行计量。 (ii)Digiwire Co has exchanged non-monetary assets for its investment in FourDee Co,and thus needs to de-recognisethe assets it is contributing to FourDee Co.The carrying amount of $6 million of the property is derecognised but theintellectual property of Digiwire Co has been generated internally and does not have a carrying amount.The cryptocurrency is recorded as an asset in the financial statements of Digiwire Co at $3 million but willbe valued at$4 million,its fair value in the financial statements of FourDee Co. 投资成立一家新公司，投资公司要把对应的投资的资产转移给新公司，来换取新公司的股权。所以对 于 Digiwire Co,相当于于投资的资产，换回来新公司的股权资产。于是要在财报商终止确认投资资 产，确认换回来的股权资产。因为内部产生的知识产权这类无形资产没有在财报上确认，就不需要终 止确认。 Accordingly,when a joint venturer contributes a non-monetary asset to a joint venture in exchange for an equity interest in the joint venture,the joint venturer recognises a portion of the gain or loss on disposal which is attributable to the other parties to the joint venture(except when the contribution lacks commercial substance). 讨论权益法的计量的原则就是按比例分享共同控制企业的收益。 Essentially,Digiwire Co is required by IAS 28 to limit the profit on disposal of its non-monetary assets to 50%.Effectively,Digiwire has only disposed of 50%of the asset contributed to the joint venture.Thus the carrying amount of the joint venture in Digwire's financial statements at 31 December 20X6 will be $11-5 million($6+$3 carrying amounts derecognised for property and cryptocurrency)+(4-3)/2)+((10-6)/2)). A gain of $2·5 million will be recorded in profit or loss. 因为年底投资到共同控制企业的资产FV 上升了，所以赚钱了。所以按50%的持股比例分享。 (iii)If the cryptocurrency meets the definition of a financial asset,it is possible to measure it at fair value. However,cryptocurrency is not cash or cash equivalents as its value is exposed to significant changes in market value and there is no contractual right to receive either cash or cash equivalents.Therefore, cryptocurrency fails the definition of a financial asset. 加密货币不是现金及现金等价物，也没有合同约定的收钱的权力。所以不是金融资产(不满足金融资 产的定义) 月 GOLDEN EDUCATION ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM If the cryptocurrency is to be recognised as an intangible asset,then the default position would be to measure it at cost. 如果是无形资产，初始计量用成本计量。 However,there may be an argument to say that there is an active market for the cryptocurrency in which case, it would be possible for it to be measured at fair value.In this case,movements in that fair value would be recognised through other comprehensive income and the gain would not be recycled through profit or loss when the cryptocurrency is realised. 加密货币，比如比特币有很大的交易市场，交易频率也很频繁。所以一般可以用FV 进行计量。按照 IAS38, 应该是FVTOCI。 The best way to account for a cryptocurrency would be fair value as that is the value at which the entity will realise their investment or transact in exchange for goods and services.Accounting for cryptocurrency at fair value with movements reflected in profit or loss would provide the most useful information to investors but existing accounting requirements do not appear to permit this. 加密货币主要用于交易，所以FVTPL 会更合适。 【知识拓展】 虚拟货币属于current issue 中的热门话题之一，同学可以参考考官文章： >SectionA-Accounting ethics in the digital age Section C-Cryptocurrencies (c)(i) Explain the reasons behind the issue of the amendment to International Accounting Standard(IASR) 19:Plan Amendment,Curtailment or Settlement an d discuss why the changes to the calculation of net interest and current service cost were considered necessary.(3 marks) (ii) Advise the directors of Digiwire Co on the impact of the amendment to IAS 19 on the calculation of net interest and current service cost for the year ended 31 December 20X6.(4 marks) Requirement解析： (c)(i)解释国际会计准则(IAS®)19 修正案问题背后的原因： 计划修订、缩减或结算，并讨论为什么改变净利息和当前服务成本的计算被认为是必要的。 (ii)就修订对截至12月31日至20x6 年12月31日的净利息和当期服务成本计算的影响提出意见。 分析思路： 第一步：分配分值。本题各小问分值明确；可略过。 第二步：判断准则。会计处理相关题目， 一定要结合案例和题目判断准确考核的准则。在本题我们可 以直接判断出涉及的是 IAS19 和 它 的current issue. 第三步：判断考核对应准则的哪个考点。 一般来说，准则考点为定义，初始确认，初始计量，后续计 量，终止确认这几个点。考核要么选取其中一个来考，要么综合进行考核。本题我们可以发现(i)修订 的理由；(ii)考核的是修订的后续计量。 按上述步骤分析完毕后，再开始答题，才有效率。 (c)(i)Before the amendment,IAS 19 Employee Benefits did not require entities to revise the assumptions for the calculation of current service cost and net interest during the accounting period,even if an entity remeasured the net defined benefit liability or asset in the event of a plan amendment,curtailment or settlement.The calculations were based on the actuarial assumptions as at the start of the financial year. 现行准则规定，养老金计划在当期会计期间期中发生变化，仍按期初未变化的精算差异假设进行计算。 However,the International Accounting Standards Board felt that it was inappropriate to ignore any updated assumptions when determining current service cost and net interest for the period. 但是这种处理很明显不够公允客观。 Therefore,an amendment to IAS 19 states that when a plan amendment,curtailment or settlement occurs during the annual reporting period,an entity must: 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION -Determine current service cost for the remainder of the period after the plan amendment,curtailment or settlement using the actuarial assumptions used to remeasure the net defined benefit liability/asset reflecting the benefits offered under the plan and the plan assets after that event. -Determine net interest for the remainder of the period after the plan amendment,curtailment or settlement using: (i)the net defined benefit liability/asset reflecting the benefits offered under the plan and the plan assets after that event;and(ii)the discount rate used to remeasure that net defined benefit liability/asset. IAS19 修订的基本内容，必背的考点。要按照修订日的新的精算假设，从修订日到期末报表日进行重 新计算。 (ii)If Digiwire Co had not applied the revised IAS 19,then the current service cost would have been $108 million(12 months x$9 million).On the application of the revised standard,the current service cost would be $96 million((8 months x$9 million)+(4 months x$6 million)).Thus there will be a reduction in the current service cost of$12 million. 根据案例信息计算具体调整数字 Similarly,the net interest component before the amendment would have been $900,000(3%x$30 million). After the amendment it would be $1,020,000($900,000x8/12)+(3·5%x$36m x 4/12)).Therefore,there willbe a change in the net interest element of $120,000($1,020,000-$900,000).The net effect will be to change the re-measurement component by$11,880,000 根据案例信息计算具体调整数字，精算差异假设的调整计入OCI 。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM

stem_zh: Q1 Required:Draft an explanatory note to the directors of Hummings Co,addressing the following: (a) how the functional currency of Crotchet Co should be determined;(5 marks) Requirement
explanation_zh: 题目主要考查IAS21 号准则中如何确定海外子公司的记账本位币。 答案解析： 确定海外子公司的记账本位币首要去分析子公司的记账本位币是否需要和母公司保持一致，如果母子公司 关系比较紧密，那么子公司的记账本位币就应该和母公司保持一致，否则反之。其次再去根据IAS21 号 准 则中所讲的primary factor 来确定子公司的记账本位币，如果根据primary factor 也确定不了，那么就根 据 secondary factor来确定。这是做这一类题目的总体解题思路。 题目中有这么一句话： “Crotchet Co has a high degree of autonomy and is not reliant on finance from Hummings Co,nor do sales to Hummings Co make up a significant proportion of their income. ”通过这句话可以看出海外子公司不依赖于母公司，有很大的自主权，所以得出结论子公司的记账 本位币没有必要和母公司保持一致。所以C 公司的记账本位币不必是$。 其次我们需要按照primary factor来考虑，一个是影响公司商品服务定价的币种 (一般是看公司的商品服 务卖出去开票的币种，核心词是invoiced), 一个是影响公司商品服务成本的币种 (一般是看公司的商品 服务生产出来所产生的原材料支出，人工工资支出，其他的成本支出)。根据题目意思可知：C 公司所有的 sales 都是按照grommits 来开票的。在采购方面都是按照grommits 来开票的，在工资方面，一般的人是 按照grommits 来支付的，一般的人是按照dinar 来支付的。从这边可以看出grommits 对于公司而言比 重是比较大的。 再者我们需要考虑secondary factor 中的两个因素，一个是公司经营活动收到的资金还留在公司的币种， 一个是看公司融资活动收到的是什么样的币种。根据题目意思可知：C 公司经营活动收到的币种还留在公司 的包括grommits 和 dinar, 筹资活动收到的都是grommits。 综上所述，C 公司的业务中grommits 所占的币种更大，所以C 公司的记账本位币应该是grommits。 (b)(i) how Crotchet Co's customer contracts should be accounted for in the consolidated financial statements of Hummings Co,which are presented in dollars($),for the year ended 31 December 20X4;(4 marks) Requirement解析： 题目问的是这批合同该如何进行会计处理，结合题意，主要是考查计算商誉的第三个数的FV adjustment, 即 FV of identifiable net asset of Subsidiary at acquisition date。 答案解析： 母公司在收购子公司的时候在实现控制的当天都要去计算商誉，计算商誉会涉及到收购日当天子公司可识 别净资产的公允价值。有些资产在子公司的单体报表上可能并没有确认，比如本题中C 公司和客户签订的 合同。根据IAS38号准则，内部产生的无形资产一般不能在单体报表上确认，除了R&D。但是这些无形资 产如果满足特定的条件是可以在合并报表上确定的，这些条件包括identifiable,control,公允价值能够 可靠计量。 而是否满足 identifiable 要根据IAS38 号准则中关于 identifiable 的定义，无形资产可以通过两种方式去 做到可辨认，第一种是根据市场的方式去证明，第二种是可以根据法律的方式去证明。很明显这边属于C 公司和客户签订的是合同，合同是具有法律约束力的，即能够通过法律的方式证明该合同是能够 identifiable的。其次根据题目意思该合同的FV 也是直接已知了，说明其公允价值能够可靠计量；再者， 公司也能够实现控制，因为有合同的存在，合同具有法律约束力，所以该合同可以阻止客户从我们的竞争 对手处采购商品或服务。因此对于该合同在计算商誉的时候需要进行公允价值的调整，并且其应该按照FV 计入合并资产负债表中，而不是将其价值包含进商誉当中。 该合同在收购日当天的价值是15 million grommits, 这个需要按照收购日当天的汇率$1 to 8 grommits 换算成为$1.875 million 美元，这个是其初始入账进行，后续该无形资产去进行摊销，因为合同一般都要 合同年限，就按照合同年限去进行摊销，对于每年的摊销金额按照平均汇率来进行折算，年底的时候无形 资产的账面价值又按照年底的汇率进行折算，产生的汇兑损益计入 OCI 或 equity。 (ii)a calculation of the goodwill on acquisition of Crotchet Co (in grommits)and how it would be accounted for in the consolidated statement of financial position of Hummings Co at 31 December 20X4 after translation. Include a brief explanation and calculation of how the impairment and exchange difference on goodwill will impact on the consolidated financial statements;(6 marks) Requirement解析： 计算母公司收购C 公司产生的商誉，以及商誉金额如何从外币grommits translate 成为$,商誉的减值以 及商誉产生的汇兑损益如何影响合并报表。 答案解析： 首先计算收购日当天的商誉： 1)收购对价的公允价值是$24million,换算成grommits 需要用到收购日当天的汇率，是$1:8 grommits, 所以是192 million grommits。 2)收购日当天的少数股东权益是用公允价值的方法，金额是$6m, 换算成grommits 需要用到收购日当天 的汇率，是$1:8 grommits, 所以是48 million grommits。 3)收购日当天子公司可识别的净资产的公允价值是43 million grommits 和50 million dinar,dinar 按 照收购日当天的汇率1 dinar:2 grommits 换算成grommits 是100 million grommits。在加上公允价值 调增的15 million grommits,总共是158 million grommits,所以收购日当天商誉是82 million grommits。 按照收购日当天的汇率$1 to 8 grommits换算成美元是$10.25million. 在 2 0x4 年商誉减值了30%,所以是82*30%=24.6million grommits,减值损失应该按照平均汇率进行 translate, 但是题目没有已知平均汇率，故只能退而求其次用年底的汇率$1:7 grommits, 换算成 $3.51million,因此年底的商誉是82 million grommits-24.6million grommits=57.4 million grommits, 按照年底的汇率$1:7 grommits, 换算成$8.2million,所以倒挤出汇兑收益是$1.46million。 因为商誉是 full goodwill, 所以商誉产生的汇兑损益也应该由子公司所有的 shareholder 来进行承担，即 其中80%由母公司承担，20%由少数股东来承担。 (c) how Quaver Co should be accounted for in the consolidated financial statements at 31 December 20X4; and (4 marks) Requirement解析： 考查IFRS5 号准则中，买来就是为了出售的子公司如何在合并报表上进行账务处理。 答案解析： 虽 然Q 公司是H 公司的全资子公司，但是H 公司收购Q 公司的目的就是为了之后出售它，所以这种和传 统意义上的子公司不是一个概念，那么也就不需要按照传统的母子公司的关系而去将Q 公司纳入到合并范 围编制合并报表。 根据IFRS5 号准则，买来就是为了出售的子公司如果再额外满足持有待售的条件的话，就能够作为一项 discontinued operation终止经营。那么我们就要去分析一下是不是满足持有待售的2个条件：1)当前 的状态能不能立即出售，2)出售的可能性是不是极有可能。其中又包括：能否在未来12个月之内出售， 积极地寻找卖价，合理的定价，计划不太可能撤销等等。虽然未在12个月之内出售，但是还是可以继续划 分成为持有待售，因为出现了不受企业所控制的意外事件且未来还是会继续出售，所以综上分析得出， Q 公司是满足持有待售的条件的。那么Q 公司就是属于终止经营。 对于终止经营的话，Q 公司在合并报表上应该是按照FV-CTS 来进行核算，初始计量和后续计量的变动计 入 PL。在损益表上作为终止经营部分产生的损益应该和集团持续经营部分产生的损益分开来列示。 (d)a calculation and discussion of how the bonds should be accounted for in the financial statements of Hummings Co as at 31 December 20X3 and for the year ended 31 December 20X4,including any impairment losses.(11 marks) Requirement解析： 考查IFRS9 号准则中债权性质金融资产的计量和减值。 答案解析： 由于公司持有该债券的目的是为了收取合同形式的现金流，所以应该按照摊余成本法进行核算。初始计量 按照 FV+T/C 即$10,000,000。 根据金融资产减值的规定， 在初始计量的时候由于风险比较低，属于减值模型的 stage 1, 所以应该确认未 来12个月的预期信用损失。根据题目已知是$10,000。所以分录也应该是借方： P/L 10,000, 贷方： Loss allowance 10,000。在进行账务处理的时候贷方是计入loss allowance而不是直接冲减 FA 的账面价值， 但是列示在资产负债表的时候loss allowance 金额越大，FA 的账面价值越低，所以在资产负债表上该金融 资产的账面价值是$9.99 million ($10 million-$0.1m)。 因为该金融资产是按照摊余成本法核算的，所以在年底的时候需要计息和收利息。由于计息金额是账面价 值10,000,000*实际利率8%=800,000,实际收到的利息是面值10,000,000*票面利率5%=500,000,所 以20x4 年12月31日的账面价值是10,300,000。 根据题意可以得知，在第一年年底的时候该债券的信用风险已经显著增加，但是又没有实际可观的减值证 据出现，所以分析出该债券在这个时点属于金融资产减值模型的stage 2,我们应该确认的是整个生命周期 的预期信用损失。根据题目可以得知，20x5 年预期收到的现金流的现值是462,963,违约事件发生的可能 性是3%,因为一旦违约这个款项就收不到了，所以预期信用损失的部分应该是462,963*3%=13,889;如 果违约事件在20x6年发生的话，那么会使得企业少收到利息和本金，这部分现金缺口的现值是685,8710. 但是违约事件发生的可能性并不是百分之百，而是5%,所以预期信用损失是342,936。综上得知整个生命 周期的预期信用损失是13,889+342,936=356,825. 因为预期信用损失期初账上已经有了10,000,所以今年只需要针对于其增减变动部分进行账务处理即可， 所以分录是借方：P/L 346,825,贷方：346,825.年底的时候该金融资产列示在资产负债表上的账面价值是 10,300,000-356,825=9,943,175.

stem_zh: Q3 Leria Co is an internationally successful football club.Leria Co is preparing the financial statements for thee year ending 31 October 20X5 but is currently facing liquidity problems. 题干解析1:Stadium sale/leaseback and improvements 本题每一段的描述考察的是企业不同的经济事项的会计处理。 Leria 公司已经就其体育场签订了合同，将于20X6 年11月30日出售体育场，并立即将其租回去。 Leria 公司的董事希望在截至20X5 年 1 0 月 3 1 日的财务报表中将体育场列为“持有待售”的非流动资产，因为 他们认为在当天出售的可能性很大。 分析：这一段考察的是IFRS5-非流动资产持有代售的确认。那就要从准则规定的确认条件入手去考虑。 该销售合同要求处置体育场的公允价值(市场价值)为3000万美元，而Leria公司将其回租的租期超过 10年。按20X6 年11月30日市场利率计算的租赁款项的现值为2600万美元。这种体育场的市场价值已 经几年没有变化了，在不久的将来也不太可能发生变化。该体育场采用加速折旧法，加速折旧率为5%。 分析：这一段考察的是IFRS16-lease 的售后回租。那就要从准则规定的售后回租的会计处理去考虑。 截至20X6 年 1 0 月 3 1 日，预计将花费200万美元来改良体育场的观众护栏。没有法律业务一定要对观众 护栏进行改良。Leria 公司错误地将该金额视为截至20X5 年10月31日资产账面价值的减少，相应的借记 为损益。截至20X5 年10月31日，其账面金额，经过折旧和扣除观众护栏改良支出后，是1800万美元。 分析：这一段首先有谈到法律义务， 一看见权力和义务，马上要想到权责发生制的问题。然后涉及资产改 良支出，那就是IAS16 资产改良支出资本化，费用化的问题。 Requirement
explanation_zh: (a)Discuss with reference to International Financial Reporting Standards(IFRSR): (i)whether the directors can classify the stadium as held for sale at 31 October 20X5; 董事是否能将体育场划分为持有代售在20X5 年10月31日； (ii)Leria Co's accounting treatment of the crowd barrier improvements at 31 October 20X5; Leria 公司在20X5 年10月31日改良体育场的观众护栏的会计处理 (iii)the principles of the accounting treatment for the sale and leaseback of the stadium at 30 November 20X6. (13 marks) 在20X6 年10月31日体育场出售及回租的会计处理原则。 分析思路： 第一步：分配分值。(a)问合计13分，但三小问各自的分值没有告知。所以首先要感觉题目内容和问题要求 对分值进行分配.三小问中，售后回租是比较难的，所以可以分5分给售后回租，另外两小问每问4分。 第二步：判断准则。会计处理相关题目，一定要结合案例和题目判断准确考核的准则。在本题我们可以分 别判断出涉及的是 IFRS5,IAS16,IFRS16. 第三步：判断考核对应准则的哪个考点。 一般来说，准则考点为定义，初始确认，初始计量，后续计量， 终止确认这几个点。考核要么选取其中一个来考，要么综合进行考核。本题我们可以发现(i)考核的是IFRS5 的确认；(ii)考核的是IAS16 后续支出的资本化还是费用化(iii)考核的售后回租的计量，还涉及了一个IAS16 的后续计量。 按上述步骤分析完毕后，再开始答题，才有效率。 答案解析： IFRS 5 Non-current Assets Held for Sale and Discontinued Operations addresses the accounting for assets which are classified as held for sale.IFRS 5 requires a non-current asset to be classified as held for sale if its carrying amount will be recovered principally through a sale transaction rather than through its continuing use. It must be available for immediate sale in its present condition,and its sale must be highly probable within 12 months of classification as held for sale. 先列出 NCAHFS 的定义和确认条件，确认条件很多，本小题4分，列出和本题最相关的就可。因为本题明 确给到了时间间隔，所以时间这个条件是要列出来的。 The standard only foresees an exemption to this rule if the sale is delayed by events or circumstances which are beyond the entity's control,which is unlikely to be the case in this instance. 超过12个月还能划分为NCAHFS 的条件，判断本题是否满足。 Leria Co has entered into a firm sales commitment but the sale will occur after the 12-month threshold. Therefore,the stadium cannot be classified as held for sale. 对时间条件的案例应用判断。 Additionally,a sale and leaseback transaction is outside the scope of IFRS 5 and is covered by IFRS 16 Leases. 售后回租的问题可以不在本题讨论。这句话可以不写。 The $2 million to be spent on crowd barrier improvements to the stadium should not be treated as an impairment of the asset's carrying amount at 31 October 20X5. 减值是资产价值的减少，不是增加.PPE 还得有减值迹象之后，做了减值测试，账面价值高于可回收金额才 能减值 . There is no present obligation(legal or constructive)as a result of a past event and there is no probable payment. 没有义务，现在就没有权责发生，就不应该作账务处理。 Leria Co may decide not to carry out the improvements,especially as the stadium is going to be sold and then subsequently leased back.Therefore the $2 million should be added back to the carrying amount of the stadium and a corresponding credit made to profit or loss. 会计记录差错调整。 A sale and leaseback transaction occurs where an entity transfers an asset to another entity and leases that asset back from the buyer/lessor. 解释什么是售后回租 The first required criteria of IFRS standards is to determine whether a sale has occurred. 先确认销售是否发生，因为本题没有明显的暗示去判断到底有没有销售的存在，所以后续就分别把两种情 况都拿来讨论。这是所有应试的同学都可以使用的答题方式。就是你自己无法区分的时候，你就把所有的 情况都简单地说一说，总有一种会拿分。把你认为最有可能的情况可以适当详细说一下。 Under IFRS 16,an entity must apply the IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers requirements to determine when a performance obligation is satisfied.If it is concluded that the transfer of an asset is not a sale,then the seller/lessee will continue to recognise the transferred asset.In this event,a financial liability and financial asset will be recognised under IFRS 9 Financial Instruments. 没有销售发生的情况，就是抵押贷款。 In this case,it seems that a sale will occur on 30 November 20X6 because of the binding sale commitment.If the fair value of the sale consideration equals the asset's fair value,and the lease payments are at market rates, there is no need to adjust the sales proceeds under IFRS 16. 有销售发生的情况，就是先销售，再回租。 Leria Co should follow IFRS 15 to account for the sale and then apply IFRS 16 to account for the lease.Thus, Leria Co should account for the sale and leaseback as follows: -Derecognise the underlying asset. -Recognise the sale at fair value. -Recognise only the gain/loss which relates to the rights transferred to buyer/lessor. -Recognise a right-of-use asset as a proportion of the previous carrying amount of the underlying asset. -Recognise a lease liability. 销售发生的情况的售后回租的处理模型。这个模型必背，基本属于售后回租的必考必拿分点。 Leria Co should account for the sale and leaseback at 30 November 20X6 as follows: Carrying amount of stadium is $(18+2)million= $20 million Less Depreciation for year to 31 October 20X6$(20x 05)million ($1 million) Less Depreciation for November 20X6$(20-1)x·05)/12)million($0·08 million) 三 $18-92 million million 期末账面价值乘以留存比例，等于回租的ROU asset的初始确认账面价值 The gain on disposal is limited to the gain on the portion of the asset sold recognising that Leria has retained an interest in the asset.It will be reported in the statement of profit or loss.
