Operating activity调增 Disposal of Doyle Co (124.6) T/P C/F a+224.2 应付账款总共增加348.8,所以在经营活动中要调减560.5,由于合并现流表中已经调减 了379.2,所以只需要再调增124.6就好了。 ONLINE DELIVERY ·PLATINUM Working3: Dr PPE exchange received 50 Cr Gain on disposal 5 Operating activity调减 Cr PPE exchange given up 45 固定资产以物易物时产生的利得5会使得PBT增加，对经营活动现金流没有影响，所以 应该在经营活动现金流当中调减。 PPE B/F 4219.2 Cash purchased y=1815.8 Investing activity调减 PPE exchange received 50 PPE exchange given up 45 Depreciation expense 775.1 Operating activity调增 Disposal of Doyle Co 311.9 PPE C/F 4953 现金购买固定资产使得现金总共减少1815.8,题目已知现流表当中已经记录了733.8, 所以只需要补记1082就好了。今年固定资产折旧费用金额为775.1,会使得PBT减少， 对经营活动现金流没有影响，所以应该在经营活动现金流当中调增。 Working4: 从20x6.4.1到年底20x6.9.30这六个月对D公司的投资变成了联营公司，所以按照权益 法核算，产生share of profit of associate 24.6,会使得PBT增加，对经营活动现金流没有 影 响，所以应该在经营活动现金流当中调减。 (c)Deferred tax According to IAS 12 Income Taxes,an entity should recognise a deferred tax asset in respect of the carry-forward of unused tax losses to the extent that it is probable that future taxable profit will be available against which the losses can be utilised.IAS 12 stresses that the existence of unused losses is strong evidence that future taxable profit may not be available. For this reason,convincing evidence is required about the existence of future taxable profits. IAS 12 states that entities should consider whether the tax losses result from identifiable causes which are unlikely to recur.Hill Co has now made losses in three consecutive financial years,and therefore significant doubt exists about the likelihood of future profits being generated. 根据IAS12 号准则的规定，要想根据亏损确认递延所得税资产必须是公司在未来有足够 多的应税利润且该应税利润出现在亏损能够抵税的时效性之内。 H 公司连续三年都是亏 损其实就是强有力的证据表明公司在未来出现应税利润的可能性没有达到很可能。而且 公司要分析为什么公司连续三年都是亏损的原因。 Although Hill Co is forecasting an improvement in its trading performance,this is a result of new products which are currently under development.It will be difficult to reliably forecast the performance of these products.More emphasis should be placed on the performance of existing products and existing customers when assessing the likelihood of future tradingprofits. existing products and existing customers when assessing the likelihood of future trading 虽 然H 公司预测未来三年公司的财务状况能够得到很大的改善，因为公司将要发布一款 新产品，虽然这款产品还处于研发过程当中。说实话这个是很难说服大家的，因为这款 产品还处于研发当中，能够研发成功都是一个问号，而且就算研发成功了新产品发行到 市场当中也不是一定会得到市场的认可。 Finally,Hill Co breached a bank loan covenant and some uncertainty exists about its ability to continue as a going concern.This,again,places doubts on the likelihood of future profits and suggests that recognition of a deferred tax asset for unused tax losses would be inappropriate. 最后，公司违反了贷款协议导致银行在年底有权利要求企业立即偿还贷款，而公司又没 有能力全额偿还，这就导致了持续经营问题的出现。 Based on the above,it would seem that Hill Co would be incorrect to recognise a deferred tax asset in respect of its unused tax losses. 综上所述，公司针对亏损全额确认递延所得税资产是不正确的。 (d)Convertible bond Hill Co has issued a compound instrument because the bond has characteristics of both a financial liability(an obligation to repay cash)and equity (an obligation to issue a fixed number of Hill Co's own shares).IAS 32 Financial Instruments:Presentation specifies that compound instruments must be split into: H 公司发行了可转债，应该一部分列示到金融负债一部分列示到权益当中。其中列示到 金融负债当中的金额是未来所需要支付的利息和偿还的本金的现值的合计数，列示到权 益当中的金额为发行可转债收到的钱和列示到金融负债当中的金额之间的差额。 ● a liability component(the obligation to repay cash)measured at the present value of the cash repayments,discounted using the market rate on non-convertible bonds;and ● an equity component (the obligation to issue a fixed number of shares)measured as the residual amount(difference cash received and the liability component). The initial carrying amount of the liability will be measured at $17·9 million,calculated as follows: Date Cash flow $m Discount rate Present value $m 30 Sep 20X7 0 ·8 0 ·909 0 ·73 30 Sep 20X8 20 ·8 0 ·826 7.91 The equity component should be initially measured at $2.1 million ($20m-$17.9m).The equity component will remain unchanged. 根据上述理论方法得知，列示到金融负债当中的金额为17.9,列示到权益当中的金额为 2.1. After initial recognition,the liability will be measured at amortised cost,as follows: 1 October 20X6 Finance cost(10%) Cash paid ($20mx4%)30 September 20X7 $m $m $m $m 17·9 18 (0 ·8) 18·9 The finance cost to be recorded in profit or loss for the year will be $1 ·8 million. The liability will have a carrying amount of $18·9 million as at the reporting date. The interest paid of $0.8 million will be a cash outflow presented in the operating activities section of the statement of cash flows. 列示到金融负债当中的金额17.9需要进行后续计量，即年底需要对其计息和付利息。 今年的利息费用为1.8,今年实际支付的利息为0.8.负债的期末数为18.9. 题干解析： Gustoso Co是一家上市公司，生产一系列豪华食品。它根据 IFRS编制财务报表。 Gustoso Co 的董事们每年都会收到一笔现金奖金，前提是报告的利润超过了预先设定的目标。 截至20X7年12月31日，Gustoso 公司的一年表现超出了目标，但20X8年的财务预测并 不乐观的。【因此对于G 公司的管理层来说，就会产生Self-interest 的道德威胁，管理层 为了拿到这笔现金奖励(因为和自身的利息相挂钩),因此往往会操纵报表以此来达到 设定的目标。】 Exhibit 1 Provisions 预计负债 A new accountant has recently started work at Gustoso Co.She noticed that the provisions balance as at 31 December 20X7 is significantly higher than in previous years.She made enquiries of the finance director,who explained that the increase was due to substantial changes in food safety and hygiene laws which become effective during 20X8.As a result, Gustoso Co must retrain a large proportion of its workforce.This retraining has not taken place yet,so a provision has been recognised for the estimated cost of $2 million.The finance director then told the accountant that such enquiries were a waste of time and would not be considered favourably when deciding on her future pay rises and bonuses. 一名新会计最近开始在Gustoso 公司工作。她注意到截至20X7 年12月31日的预计负 债的余额明显高于前几年。她询问了财务总监，财务总监解释说，这一增长是由于食品 安全和卫生法的重大变化，这些法律将于2008年生效。因此， Gustoso Co 必须对其大 部分员工进行再培训。由于再培训尚未进行，因此先确认了一笔200万美元的预计负债。 财务总监随后告诉会计师，这种询问是浪费时间，在决定她未来的加薪和奖金时不会得 到有利的考虑。 Additionally in November 20X7,the board of directors discussed a potential restructure of Gustoso Co.The restructuring plans included an analysis of long term cost savings but, should the restructure take place,there will be significant short term costs which would be necessary.These include professional fees,penalties for cancelling leases and also redundancy costs for a number of employees.Even if the restructure did not take place exactly as planned,alternative plans will need to be explored to ensure Gustoso Co remains a going concern.The finance director has therefore included a restructuring provision arguing that this is prudent.A final decision and announcements to staff and lessors are likely to be made prior to the authorisation of the financial statements which is expected in April 20X8. 此外，在20X7 年11月，董事会讨论了Gustoso 公司的潜在重组。重组计划包括对长期 成本节约的分析，但如果进行重组，将需要大量的短期成本，其中包括专业费用、取消 租赁的罚款以及一些员工的裁员费用。即使重组没有完全按计划进行，也需要探索其他 计划，以确保 Gustoso 公司哪个继续经营下去。因此，财务总监加入了一项重组条款， 认为这是谨慎的。最终决定可能会在财务报表发布之前向员工和出租人发布公告，预计 财务报表将于20X8 年4月发布。 Exhibit 2 Wheat contract 小麦合同 Gustoso Co purchases significant quantities of wheat on which Gustoso Co records significant profit margins.The price of wheat is volatile and so,on 1 November 20X7,Gustoso Co entered into a contract with a supplier to purchase 500,000 bushels of wheat in June 20X8 for $5 a bushel.The contract can be settled net in cash.Gustoso Co has entered into similar contracts in the past and has always taken delivery of the wheat.By 31 December 20X7 the price of wheat had fallen.The finance director recorded a derivative liability of $0·5 million on the statement of financial position and a loss of $0·5 million in the statement of profit or loss.Wheat prices may rise again before June 20X8.The accountant is unsure if the current accounting treatment is correct but feels uncomfortable approaching the finance director again. Gustoso 公司购买了大量小麦，并因此获得了可观的利润。小麦价格波动很大，因此， 2007年11月1日， Gustoso 公司与一家供应商签订了一份合同，于2008年6月以每蒲 式耳5美元的价格购买500,000蒲式耳小麦。这份合同可以用现金结算。Gustoso 公 司 过去也签订过类似的合同，并且总是接收小麦。到2007年12月31日，小麦价格已经 下跌。财务主任在财务状况表中记录了50万美元的衍生负债，在损益表中记录了50万 美元的损失。小麦价格可能在6月20X8之前再次上涨。会计师不确定当前的会计处理 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION 是否正确，但又不愿意去找财务总监。 答案解析： 预计负债： G 公司的会计人员发现G 公司20X7年的预计负债金额会高于往年。而G 公司管理层给 出的理由是，因为食品行业的安全条例/法律将会在20X8年发生重大的变革，因此公司 需要重新培训员工以便于遵循最新的法律/法规，因此在20X7 年确认了预计负债金额2m。 但是根据IAS 37的规定，员工培训的费用是不可以确认为预计负债的，因此该笔费用是 和企业未来的经营活动是有关联的。因此确认员工培训费用作为预计负债，会涉及到盈 余管理 (Earnings management),即管理层通过设定预计负债来操纵企业当期的利润。并 且管理层告知给财务人员询问此类问题完全是浪费时间并且对未来自己的薪酬会产生 不利的影响，因此在此产生了Intimidation 的道德威胁，威胁会计人员的薪资以让会计 人员屈服。 小麦合同： G 公司通常会采购大量的小麦用于生产面包和意大利面，面包和意大利面会给 G 公司带 来很高的利润率。然而小麦的价值波动性很高，因此对于G 公司来说如果原材料(小麦) 价格一旦上涨，势必很影响到本公司的利润率。因此为了降低小麦价格波动对于公司所 造成的影响，G 公司和供应商签订了远期合约，约定好在20X年6月从供应商那以$5/ 蒲式耳的单件去购买500,000 蒲式耳(一种计量单位，不用纠结),该合约最终以现金做 结算。同时 G 公司也有一份购买小麦的合约。但是该公司签订该合约的目的是要预计购 买小麦为目的而签订的一份非金融项目的合约，因此针对于该笔合约(非金融项目的买 卖合同)实际符合”自用豁免”(own-use contract)的规定，因此该笔合约是不要作为衍生合 约做处理。 因此对于该类合同是不需要确认金融负债0.5m, 因此最终做处理的时候需要减少进入 负债，增加企业当期的利润0.5m。

stem_zh: Q4 背景信息： Kiki is a public limited entity.It designs and manufactures children's toys.It has a reporting date of 31 December 20X7 and prepares its financial statements in accordance with International Financial Reporting Standards.The directors require advice about the following situations. Kiki 是一家上市公司。它主要的经营范围是设计和制造儿童玩具(指明了业务模式)。其 报告日期为20X7 年12月31日，并根据IFRS 编制财务报表。董事会要求就以下情况提 供建议。 Requirement
explanation_zh: (a)The directors require advice about how revenue from the following sources should be accounted for in the financial statements for the year ended 31 December 20X7: (i)gift cards(6marks) (ii)royalty(6marks) 针 对gift cards 给出相应的会计处理。 题干解析： (a)(i)Kiki sells $50 gift cards.These can be used when purchasing any of Kiki's products through its website.The gift cards expire after 12 months.Based on significant past experience,Kiki estimates that its customers will redeem 70%of the value of the gift card and that 30%of the value will expire unused.Kiki has no requirement to remit any unused funds to the customer when the gift card expires unused. Kiki 出售50美元的礼品卡。当通过 Kiki的网站购买Kiki 的任何产品时，都可以使用这些 工具。礼品卡在12个月后到期。根据以往的重要经验， Kiki 估计，其客户将赎回礼品卡 价值的70%,30%的价值将过期而不使用。 Kiki没有要求在礼品卡到期未使用时将任何 未使用的资金退给客户。董事们不确定如何对礼品卡进行会计处理。(6分) 解题思路： 本题是对IFRS 15 收入准则的具体应用。这个 case 主要考察顾客未行使的权利存在的情 况下收入的确认。当卖出去礼品卡的时候，履约义务PO 并没有实现，所以不能确认收 入，只能当成是预收账款，同时确认合同负债。当顾客用礼品卡买商品的时候才可以确 认收入。Variable consideration 可变对价，可以可靠估计的时候，可以进行确认。估计 的方法可以根据expected value未来预期法也就是加权平均来计算，也可以用 most likely amount, 最有可能发生的金额来确认。但是在确认的时候要保证，极有可能累计确认的 额收入不会发生重大逆转。这个案例给到了以往的重要经验，30%的部分是顾客不会用， Kiki 也不会退，所以每当顾客花了35,其实就可以直接确认50的收入，这样可以可以 计算出来一个比例，就是每兑换1,其实就可以确认1.43的收入。如果收入的确认再保 守 一 些的话， Kiki也可以等到这些礼品卡过期的时候再去确认收入。 答案解析： (a)(i)IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers says that revenue should be recognised when or as a performance obligation is satisfied by transferring the promised good or service to the customer.When a customer buys a gift card they are pre-paying for a product.Revenue cannot be recognised because the entity has not yet transferred control over an asset and so has not satisfied a performance obligation.As such,cash received in respect of gift cards should be initially recognised as a contract liability. 根 据IFRS 15,当履约义务满足时，应确认收入。当客户购买礼品卡时，他们是在为产品 预付款。无法确认收入，企业尚未转移对资产的控制权，因此未履行履约义务。礼品卡 收到的现金最初应确认为合同负债。 IFRS 15 refers to a customer's unexercised rights as breakage.The guidance for variable consideration is followed when estimating breakage.In other words,the expected breakage is included in the transaction price if it is highly probable that a significant reversal in the amount of cumulative revenue recognised will not occur once the uncertainty is subsequently resolved.This means that if the company is unable to reliably estimate the breakage amount,then revenue for the unused portion of the gift card is recognised when the likelihood of the customer exercising their remaining rights becomes remote. However,if an entity is able to reliably estimate the breakage amount,then it recognises the expected breakage amount as revenue in proportion to the pattern of rights exercised by the customer.In relation to Kiki,it appears that the amount of breakage can be reliably determined and so this should be recognised in revenue as the gift card is redeemed.For every $1 redeemed,Kiki should recognise $1 ·43($1×100/70)in revenue. IFRS 15将客户未行使的权利称为breakage 。Breakage 可以参考可变对价。当不确定性得 以解决，也就是极有可能不会出现已确认累计收入金额的重大逆转，那么可以将预期未 行使将包含在交易价格中。这意味着，如果公司无法可靠地估计金额，则当客户行使其 剩余权利的可能性变得非常低的时候，才能确认礼品卡未使用部分的收入。然而，如果 企业能够可靠地估计金额，那么它会根据客户行使的权利比例将预期未行使的权利确认 为收入。就 Kiki而 言 ，breakage 似乎可以可靠地确定，因此在兑换礼品卡时应在收入中 予以确认。每兑换1美元， Kiki 应确认1 . 43美元(1x100/70 美元)的收入。 (a)(ii)题干解析 Kiki's best-selling range of toys is called Scarimon.In 20X6 Colour,another listed company, entered into a contract with Kiki for the rights to use Scarimon characters and imagery in a monthly comic book.The contract terms state that Colour must pay Kiki a royalty fee for every issue of the comic book which is sold.Before signing the contract,Kiki determined that Colour had a strong credit rating.Throughout 20X6,Colour provided Kiki with monthly sales figures and paid all amounts due in the agreed-upon period.At the beginning of 20X7, Colour experienced cash flow problems.These were expected to be short term.Colour made nominal payments to Kiki in relation to comic sales for the first half of the year.At the beginning of July 20X7,Colour lost access to credit facilities and several major customers. Colour continued to sellScarimon comics online and through specialist retailers but made no further payments to Kiki. Kiki销量最好的玩具系列是Scarimon 。20X6 年，另一家上市公司 Colour 与 Kiki签订了 一 份合同，获得在每月一本漫画书中使用Scarimon 角色和图像的权利。合同条款规定， Colour 必须为出售的每期漫画向 Kiki 支付版税。在签署合同之前， Kiki确 定Colour 的 信 用评级很高。在整个 20 X6 期 间 ，Colour 向 Kiki提供了每月的销售数据，并在商定的期 限内支付了所有到期款项。20X7 年 初 ，Colour 遇到了现金流问题。预计这些都是短期的。 Colour 就今年上半年的漫画销售向Kiki 支付了名义上的款项(名义款项可能时很低的金 额，但是还是有支付的)。20X7年 7 月 初 ，Colour 失去了信贷服务和几个主要客户。Colour 继续在网上和通过专业零售商销售Scarimon 漫画，但没有向Kiki 支付更多款项。董事不 确定如何在截至20X7年12月31日的财务报表中处理上述问题。(6分) 答题思路： 题目明确的分了三个时间：在整个20X6 期 间 ， 2 0X7 年 初 ， 2 0X7 年7月初，所以要立 足这三个时间判断能否确认收入，以及收入确认的金额。所以可以先把收入确认的五步 法写出来，然后代入案例来分别讨论。 整个20X6期间，满足收入确认条件，可以确认收入。 20X7 年上半年，虽然Colour 信用情况不好，但是仍有支付款项，所以可以继续确认收 入，应收账款要作减值测试； 20X7 年下半年，根据 case,Colour 信用恶化，没有任何支付，很可能收不回款项，不 满足收入确认条件。 答案解析： (a)(ii)According to IFRS 15,an entity should only account for revenue from a contract with a customer when it meets the following criteria: -The contract has been approved; -Rights regarding goods and services can be identified; -Payment terms can be identified; -It is probable the seller will collect the consideration it is entitled to. At inception of the agreement,Kiki and Colour entered an explicit contract which specified payment terms and conditions.Moreover,Colour had a strong credit rating and so payment was probable.As such,it would seem that the above criteria were met.IFRS 15 says that revenue from a usage-based royalty should be recognised as the usage occurs.Whether a contract with a customer meets the above criteria is only reassessed if there is a significant change in facts and circumstances. 在协议开始时，Kiki和 Colour 签订了一份明确的合同，其中规定了付款条款和条件。此 外 ，Colour 的信用评级很高，因此付款是可能的。因此，似乎符合上述标准。 IFRS 15 表 示，基于使用的特许权使用费收入应在使用发生时予以确认。只有在事实和情况发生重 大变化时，才重新评估与客户签订的合同是否符合上述标准。 In July 20X7,Colour lost major customers and sources of finance.As such,it was no longer probable that Kiki would collect the consideration it was entitled to.From July 20X7,no further revenue from the contract should be recognised.According to IFRS 9 Financial Instruments,non-payment is an indicator that the outstanding receivables are credit impaired.A loss allowance should be recognised equivalent to the difference between the gross carrying amount of the receivables and the present value of the expected future cash flows receivable from Colour.Any increase or decrease in the loss allowance is charged to profit or loss. 20X7 年 7 月 ，Colour 失去了主要客户和资金来源。因此， Kiki不再可能收取其有权获得 的对价。自20X7 年7月起，不应确认合同的进一步收入。根据IFRS 9 Financial Instruments, 未付款是未偿应收款发生信用减值的一个指标。损失备抵应确认为应收账款账面总额与 Colour 预计未来应收现金流现值之间的差额。损失准备金的增加或减少均计入损益。 (b)题干解析 As a result of rising property prices,Kiki purchased five buildings during the current period in order to benefit from further capital appreciation.Kiki has never owned an investment property before.In accordance with IAS 40 Investment Property,the directors are aware that they can measure the buildings using either the fair value model or the cost model.However, they are concerned about the impact that this choice will have on the analysis of Kiki's financial performance,position and cash flows by current and potential investors. Requirement解析： (b)Discuss the potential impact which this choice in accounting policy will have on investors' analysis of Kiki's financial statements.Your answer should refer to key financial performance ratios.(11 marks) 由于房地产价格上涨， Kiki 在本期购买了五栋建筑，以从进一步的资本增值中获益。 Kiki 以前从未拥有过投资性房地产。根据IAS 40,董事们知道，他们可以使用公允价值模型 或成本模型对建筑物进行计量。然而，他们担心这种选择将对当前和潜在投资者分析 Kiki 的财务业绩、头寸和现金流产生影响。要求：讨论这种会计政策选择对投资者分析 Kiki 财务报表的潜在影响。答案应参考关键财务绩效比率。(11分) 解题思路： 要非常熟悉两种计量模式，写出来初始计量和后续计量的账务处理方法，以及对于报表 数据的影响。因为题目要求计算关键的财务比率，但是没有指明具体是哪些，所以可以 挑选一些投资者重点关注的，比如 operating profit margin,ROCE,gearing, 以 及AFM 中 的一些指标 EBITDA 等 ， 答案解析： (b)Investment properties In accordance with IAS 40 Investment Properties,the buildings should be initially measured at cost.If the cost model is applied,then the buildings will be recognised at cost less accumulated depreciation and impairment losses.If the fair value model is applied,then the buildings will be remeasured to fair value at each reporting date.Gains and losses on remeasurement are recognised in the statement of profit or loss.No depreciation is charged. 准则运用：具体的计量方式 如果采用成本模型，则建筑物将按成本减去累计折旧和减值损失进行确认。如果采用公 允价值模型，则建筑物将在每个报告日重新计量为公允价值。重新计量的损益在损益表 中确认。不计提折旧费 Statement of financial position Assuming that property prices rise,the fair value model willlead to an increase in reported assets on the statement of financial position.In contrast,investment property measured using the cost model is depreciated,which reduces its carrying amount.This means that the fair value model may make Kiki appear more asset-rich. 假设房地产价格上涨，公允价值模型将导致财务状况表中报告的资产增加。相比之下， 使用成本模型计量的投资性房地产被折旧，从而减少其账面价值。这意味着公允价值模 型可能会让Kiki看起来更富有。 Some stakeholders may place importance on an entity's asset base,as it can be used as security for obtaining new finance.However,reporting higher assets can sometimes be perceived negatively.For example,asset turnover ratios will deteriorate,and so Kiki may appear less efficient. 一些利益相关者可能会重视企业的资产基础，因为它可以作为获得新资金的保障。然而， 报告较高的资产有时会被认为是负面的。例如，资产周转率将恶化，因此Kiki的效率可 能会降低。 If assets increase,then equity also increases.As such,the fair value model may lead to Kiki reporting a more optimistic gearing ratio.This may reduce the perception of risk, encouraging further investment. 如果资产增加，那么所有者权益也会增加。因此，公允价值模型可能会导致Kiki报告更 乐观的杠杆比率。这可能会降低风险感知，鼓励进一步投资。 Statement of profit or loss In times of rising prices,the use of the fair value model will lead to gains being reported in the statement of profit or loss.This will increase profits for the period.In contrast,the depreciation charged under the cost model will reduce profits for the period.Therefore, earnings per share,a key stock market and investor ratio,is likely to be higher if the fair value model is adopted. 价格上涨时，使用公允价值模型将导致在损益表中报告收益。这将增加该期间的利润。 相反，根据成本模型收取的折旧将减少该期间的利润。因此，如果采用公允价值模型， 每股收益(一个关键的股票市场和投资者比率)可能会更高。 However,it should be noted that fair values are volatile.In some years,fair value gains may be much larger than in other years.If property prices decline,then the fair value model will result in losses.As such,reported profits are subject to more volatility if the fair value model is adopted.This may increase stakeholders'perception of risk.In contrast,the depreciation expense recorded in accordance with the cost model will be much more predictable, meaning that investors willbe better able to predict Kiki's future results 然而，应注意的是，公允价值具有波动性。在某些年份，公允价值收益可能比其他年份 大得多。如果房地产价格下跌，那么公允价值模型将导致损失。因此，如果采用公允价 值模型，报告的利润会更加波动。这可能会增加利益相关者对风险的感知。相比之下， 根据成本模型记录的折旧费用将更加可预测，这意味着投资者将能够更好地预测 Kiki 的 未来业绩。 Many entities now present alternative performance measures(APMs),such as EBITDA (earnings before interest,tax,depreciation and amortisation).Other entities present 'underlying profit′indicators,which strip out the impact of non-operating or non-recurring gains or losses (such as the remeasurement of investment properties).Although the use of APMs has been criticised,Kiki may consider them to be useful in helping investors to assess underlying business performance through the eyes of management and to eliminate the impact of certain accounting policy choices. 许多企业提出了其他绩效指标(APM), 如息税折旧摊销前利润(息税折旧摊销前利润)。 尽 管APM 的使用受到了批评 ，Kiki可能认为它们有助于帮助投资者从管理层的角度评估 潜在的业务绩效，并消除某些会计政策选择的影响。 Statement of cash flows Accounting policy choices have no impact on the operating,investing or financing cash flows reported in the statement of cash flows. 现金流量表：会计政策选择对现金流量表中报告的经营、投资或融资现金流量没有影响。 Disclosure It should be noted that entities using the cost model for investment properties are required to disclose the fair value.Such disclosures 披露应注意，使用投资性房地产成本模型的实体需要披露公允价值。此类披露使得在不 同模型下对投资性房地产进行会计核算的实体之间能够进行更为准确的比较。 高顿教育 GOLDEN EDUCATION a)i) 题目解析： 本题中首先考查了对于商誉的计算，K 公司的 Finance director 在计算收购 H 公司和M 公司 的时候均未考虑到对于少数股东权益的计算，因此商誉的计算是不正确的。所以在a)i)中需 要让重新计算商誉，并且指出要做出具体的调整处理。 答案解析： K公司作为母公司收购了H 公司70%的股份，并且收购对价分为两块，分别为：以股换股和 或有对价。 K 公司的 Finance director 在计算商誉的时候并未考虑到对于少数股东权益的核算，并认为 收购 H 公司产生了负商誉8m, non-controlling interest Less:Fair value of S's identifiable net assets 40.00 2.00 16.38 (48.00) 10.38 以股换股为母公司使用20m 的股票去置换子公司的股份，因此母公司要新增发20m 的股票， 而这20m 的股票在收购日当天的市场价格为$2/股，所以可计算得出总的以股换股价值为 40m。 Retained earnings 2 M公司的少数股东权益价值应使用公允价值去衡量，但M 公司不是上市企业，所以 Finance director 希望使用调整后的市盈率来推导出 M 公司的市值。调整后的市盈率为19,而M 公 司的净利润为3.6m, 因此可以推导出 M 公司的市值为19*3.6m =68.40m。因为M公司为 非上市企业，因此少数股东权益的价值应使用M 公司市值的20%去核算，即68.40m*20%= 13.68m。 最终可计算得出收购 M 公司的商誉为15.68m。 a)ii) 题目解析： 在本题中K公司处置了N 公司，但是 Finance director 在计算过程中并未按照处置子公司的 方法进行计算，所以在a)ii)需要考生进行处置子公司的重新计算。 答案解析： K 公司在01/01/20X6 收购了N 公司80%的股份，并在31/12/20X6 将所持有 N 公司80%的股 份全部处置，处置价格为50m, 在处置日当天N 公司的总市值为60m, 因 此K 公司的 Finance director 对于处置的N 公司的计算处理使用了错误的方法，即50m-60m*80%=2m。 站在集团的层面计算处置子公司盈利还是亏损时，需要使用下述方法： Fair value of consideration received 50.00 Less: Fair value of S's identifiable net asset @Disposal date 60.00 Add:Goodwill @Disposal date 2.80 Less:Fair value of non-controlling interest @Disposal date (12.00) (50.80) Loss on disposal on group perspective (0.80) 被减数为K 公司处置 N 公司股份的所收到的对价，而减数应为N 公司站在集团层面80%的 价值，即处置日当天 N 公司净资产的公允价值60m, 加上N 公司在处置日当天的商誉价值， 而商誉价值计算如下所示： Fair value of purchase consideration 40.00 Fair value of non-controlling interest 8.80 Less:Fair value of S's identifiable net assets (44.00) G/W @Acquisition date 4.80 Impairment (2.00) G/W@Reporting date 2.80 (N 公司的商誉在年末的时候出现了减值，因此在处置日当天即年末的价值为2 .8m) 处置日当天N 公司净资产的公允价值加上处置日当天N 公司的商誉，实际上为N 公司在处 置日当天站在集团层面100%的价值。因为 K 公司处置了N 公司80%的股份，所以需要再扣 除20%少数股东权益的价值，即处置日当天 N 公司的市值乘以20%(60m*20%=12m)。 所以50.8m 为处置日当天 N 公司站在集团层面80%的价值，最终可以计算出处置N 公司站 在集团层面亏损了0.8m。 a)ii) 题目解析： K 公司在今年做出了重组计划并已经开始执行，因此需要考生对重组所造成的对养老金的影 响做出分析，并且判断该重组是否要确认为企业的预计负债。 答案解析： 对于 Location 1的分部，K公司决定在年末关闭半数的工厂，并且相关员工养老金的福利将 会被冻结，并且新加入员工也不会享受该养老金福利计划。在重组后，K 公司未来要履行的 责任/义务减少至8m, 因此视为削减了养老金(Curtailment); 所以重组前 K公司的责任/义 务是10m,重组后减少到8m,因此负债将会减少2m,具体变动入下图所示： Before Movement After PV of present obligation (10) 2 (8) FV of plan asset 7 - 7 Pension liability (3) 1 (1) 所以做出的相关处理为 Dr. Pension liability 2Cr.Gain/Retained earnings 2 Dr. Pension liability 2 对于 Location 2,所有的经营活动均已终止，所以K 公司需要买断所有的员工养老金，即一 次性付清该区域员工的养老金 (Settlement)。K公司为来需要履行的责任/义务是2.4m, 而 买断的价格为4m, 因此产生了Loss =1.6m,具体分录如下所示： Dr.Pension liability 2.4 Dr. Loss/Retained earnings 1.6 Cr. Cash 4 针对于该项重组，K 公司的董事会已经授权通过(即有一个详细且正式的计划),并且该计 划也开始进行执行(关闭工厂/削减养老金),所以可以推断因受到重组而影响的员工已经 被告知，因此针对于该项重组产生的费用需要确认为当期的一笔预计负债，具体分录如下所 示： Dr.Retained earnings 6 Cr.Provisions 6 b) 题目解析： K 公司在年末执行力选择权购买了M 公司剩余的20%股份，但是在购买该股份时的对价包含 或有对价，而在b)中考查的是对于该笔或有对价是否要作为企业的负债，需要考生进行判 断 。 答案解析： 根据IAS 32 的规定，若企业发行相应的金融工具，已经产生了一个现时的责任/义务，而企 业一旦有了该责任/义务将会在未来转移现金给到其他公司(即在未来一定要履行该责任/ 义务)。若公司未能产生现时的责任/义务，那么就需要作为权益类工具来处理。 同时根据理论框架中对于负债的定义，负债是指企业有一个现时的责任/义务，而该责任/ 义务是企业无法规避的，并且该责任/义务会导致未来经济利益的流出。而权益往往是指公 司所有资产递减掉所有负债后剩余的利益，换句话说企业并没有相关的责任/义务。 K 公司在年末行使了选择权购入了M 公司剩余的20%股份，以达到100%控制M 公司。而在 购入这20%股份的对价， K公司将会支付一笔固定金额的对价加上一系列或有对价，而该或 有对价最终是否要支付是取决于M 公司未来的利润涨幅。而 M 公司未来的利润是否会产生 涨幅是存在一定不确定性的，也就意味着 K公司在未来是否要支付该笔对价的责任/义务也 存在一定的不确定性。而根据IAS 32规定，或有对价的支付或收取一旦超过双方的控制， 那么就应该作为负债来处理。所以针对于该笔或有对价 K 公司是需要确认为一笔负债的。 题干分析： Abby 是一家在世界多个地区开展业务的公司。 Related party transactions 关联方交易 The accountant has discovered that the finance director of Abby has purchased goods from a company,Arwight,which the director jointly owns_with his wife and the accountant believes that this purchase should be disclosed.However,the director refuses to disclose the transaction as in his opinion it is an 'arm's length transaction.He feels that if the transaction is disclosed,it will be harmful to business and feels that the information asymmetry caused by such non-disclosure is irrelevant as most entities undertake related party transactions without disclosing them. Similarly,the director felt that competitive harm would occur if disclosure of operating segment profit or loss was made.As a result,the entity only disclosed a measure of total assets and total liabilities for each reportable segment. When preparing the financial statements for the recent year end,the accountant noticed that Arwight has not paid an invoice for several million dollars and it is significantly overdue for payment.It appears that the entity has liquidity problems and it is unlikely that Arwight will pay.The accountant believes that a loss allowance for trade receivables is required.The finance director has refused to make such an allowance and has told the accountant that the issue must not be discussed with anyone within the trade because of possible repercussions for the credit worthiness of Arwight. 会计师发现，Abby 的财务总监从Arwight 公司购买了商品，Arwight 公司是该董事与其妻子 共同拥有的公司，会计师认为该购买行为应予以披露。然而，董事拒绝披露该交易，因为他 认为这是一笔“公平交易”。他认为，如果交易被披露，将对业务有害，并认为这种不披露导 致的信息不对称是无关紧要的，因为大多数企业在进行关联方交易时都没有披露。 同样，该董事认为，如果披露经营分部的利润或亏损，将造成竞争损害。因此，该实体仅披 露了每个可报告分部的总资产和总负债。 在编制最近一个年末的财务报表时，会计师注意到Arwight 没有支付数百万美元的发票，而 且已经严重逾期付款。该企业似乎存在流动性问题， Arwight 不太可能支付。会计师认为， 应收账款需要计提及减值准备。而财务总监拒绝这样做，并告诉会计师，由于可能会对 Arwight的信用价值产生影响，因此不得与业内任何人讨论该问题。 分析：关联方关系的披露.披露内容. 经营分部的判定.披露的内容.以及隐瞒关联方关系 的原因，怀疑，道德威胁 Subsidiary fair value adjustments 子公司公允价值的调整 Additionally,when completing the consolidated financial statements,the director has suggested that there should be no positive fair value adjustments for a recently acquired subsidiary and has stated that the accountant's current position is dependent upon following these instructions.The fair value of the subsidiary is $50 million above the carrying amount in the financial records.The reason given for not fair valuing the subsidiary's net assets is that goodwill is an arbitrary calculation which is meaningless in the context of the performance evaluation of an entity 在完成合并财务报表时，董事建议对最近收购的子公司不进行正向公允价值调整，并声明会 计师的当前状况取决于以下指示。子公司的公允价值比财务记录中的账面价值高出50m。 对子公司净资产进行不公平估值的原因是，Goodwill 是一种任意计算，在企业绩效评估中毫 无意义。 分析：商誉的计算 .资产金额低估 .PPE 估值技术.这样做的动机：对于报表以及财务指标 的影响 GOLDEN ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM Goodwill impairment 商誉的减值 Finally,when preparing the annual impairment tests of goodwillarising on other subsidiaries, the director has suggested that the accountant is flexible in the assumptions used in calculating future expected cash flows,so that no impairment of goodwill arises and that the accountant should use a discount rate which reflects risks for which future cash flows have been adjusted.He has indicated that he will support a salary increase for the accountant if he follows his suggestions. 在准备 Goodwill 对其他子公司的年度减值测试时，董事建议会计在计算未来预期现金流量 时采用灵活的假设，以便Goodwill 不会发生减值，并且会计应使用反映未来现金流已调整 风险的折现率。他表示，如果听从他的建议，他将支持增加会计的工资。 分析：商誉的减值，折现率的选择，对报表的影响，动机，道德威胁 Requirement解析： Discuss the ethical and accounting implications of the above situations from the perspective of the reporting accountant.(18 marks) Professional marks will be awarded in question 2 for the application of ethical principles.(2 marks)(20 marks) 题目要求：从会计师的角度讨论上述情况对职业道德和会计记账的影响。(18分) 应用道德原则的专业分数。(2分) (20分) 解题思路： 首先问题的要求是从会计影响和职业道德的影响两个方面回答问题，所以三段话都要回答这 两个方面。同时在读题时就可以先找出不符合会计准则要求的做法，进行合理的分值分配。 关于会计做账问题，首先回答会计准则要求，再指出题目中不恰当的处理，接着站在会计师 的角度给出修改的建议，从题干分析来看， 一共有五个问题需要讨论，分别为：关联方交易 的披露，经营分部的报告披露，应收账款的减值，子公司公允价值的调整以及商誉的减值测 试，每点2分，共10分。 关于职业道德的问题，首先指出题目职业道问题2分，再给出合理的建议去解决道德冲突2 分 。 答案解析： The objective of IAS 24 Related Party Disclosures is to ensure that an entity's financial state ments contain the disclosures necessary to draw atention to the possibility that its financial position and profit or loss may have been affected by the existence of related parties and by ransactions and outstanding balances with such parties.If there have been transactions bet ween related parties,there should be disclosure of the nature of the related party relationshi p as wel as information about the transactions and outstanding balances necessary for an u nderstanding of the potential effect of the relationship on the financial statements. 【准则IAS 24关联方交易披露的原因以及披露内容】 IAS 24 要求财务报表包含必要的披露，以说明其财务状况和损益可能受到关联方的存在以及 与关联方的勒索和未偿余额的影响。如果关联方之间存在交易，则应披露关联方关系的性质 以及了解该关系对财务报表的潜在影响所需的交易和未清余额信息。 PLATINUM The director is a member of the key management personnel of the reporting entity and the entity from whom the goods were purchased is jointly controlled by that director.Therefore a related party relationship exists and should be disclosed. 结合题意，董事是企业的关键管理人员之一，采购的企业由该董事共同控制。因此，存在关 联方关系，应予以披露。 IFRS 8Operating Segments requires an entity to report financial and descriptive information about its reportable segments.Reportable segments are operating segments or aggregatio ns of operating segments which meet specified criteria.IFRS 8 does not contain a competitiv e harm exemption and requires entities to disclose the financial information which is provide d by the chief operating decision maker(CODM).The management accounts reviewed by t he CODM may contain commercially sensitive information,and IFRS 8 might require that inf ormation to be disclosed externaly.Under IFRS 8,firms should provide financial segment dis closures which enable investors to assess the different sources of risk and income as manag ement does.This sensitive information would also be available for competitors. The potential competitive harm may encourage firms to withhold segment information.Ho wever,this is contrary to IFRS 8 which requires information about the profit or loss for each r eportable segment,including certain specified revenues and expenses such as revenue from external customers and from transactions with other segments,interest revenue and expen se,depreciation and amortisation,income tax expense or income and material non -cash i tems. 【准则IAS 8 经营分部的定义以及准则要求的信息的披露】 IFRS 8经营分部要求报告分部的财务和描述性信息。可报告分部是指符合规定标准的经营分 部或经营分部的集合。 IFRS8 不包含“竞争损害”豁免，并要求各披露由首席运营决策者 (CODM) 提供的财务信息。 CODM 审查的管理账户可能包含商业敏感信息，IFRS 8可能要 求对外披露该信息。 公司应提供分部的财务信息，使投资者能够像管理层那样评估不同的风险和收入来源。竞争 对手也可以获得这些敏感信息。潜在的竞争危害可能会鼓励公司隐瞒分部信息。然而，这违 反了IFRS 8的相关规定， IFRS 8要求提供每个可报告分部的损益信息，包括特定的收入和费 用，如来自外部客户和与其他分部交易的收入、利息收入和费用、折旧和摊销、所得税费用 或收入和重大非现金项目。 Areas such as impairments of financial assets often involve the application of professional judgement.The director may have received additional information,which has alowed him to form a different opinion to that of the accountant.The matter should be discussed with the director to ascertain why no provision is required and to ask whether there is additional inf ormation available.However,suspicion is raised by the fact that the accountant has been tol d not to discuss the mater.Whilst there may be valid reasons for this,it appears again that t he related party relationship is afecting the judgement of the director. 【不进行信息披露的原因】 金融资产减值等领域通常涉及专业判断，董事可能收到了额外的信息，这使得他形成了与会 计师不同的意见。这些事件应与会计师进行讨论，以确定原因并询问是否有其他可用信息。 然而，会计师被告知不要讨论此事，这很值得怀疑，即使可能有合理的理由，但关联方关系 是影响了董事的判断。 Positive fair value adjustments increase the assets of the acquired company and as such red uce the goodwill recognised on consolidatio.However,the majority of positive fair value adj ustments usually relate to items of property,plant and equipment.As a result,extra depreci ation based on the net fair value adjustment reduces the post -acquisition profits of the su bsidiary.This has a negative impact on important financial performance measures such as E PS. 公允价值向上调整增加了被收购公司的资产，因此减少了合并时确认的商誉。然而，大多数 积极的公允价值调整通常与 PPE 相关。因此，基于净公允价值调整的额外折旧会减少子公 司的收购后利润，这对 EPS等重要财务绩效指标有负面影响。 Thereforeby reducing fair value adjustments it will mprove the apparent performance of ne W acquisitions and the consolidated financial statements.Accountants should act ethicall an d ignore undue pressure to undertake creative accounting in preparing such adjustments.G uidance such as IFRS 3BusinesS combinations and IFRS 13 Fair Value Measurement should b e used in preparing adjustments and professional valuers should be engaged where necessa ry. 因此，通过减少公允价值调整，将改善新收购和合并财务报表的表面绩效。会计人员在准备 此类调整时，应采取合乎道德的行为，忽视这种创造性会计的压力。编制报表要依据准则要 求，必要时应聘请专业估价师。 Measuring value in use,the discount rate used should be the pre -tax rate which reflects c urrent market assessments of the time value of money and the risks specific to the asset.Th e discount rate should not reflect risks for which future cash flows have beer adjusted and s hould equal the rate of return which investors would require if they were to choose an inves tment which would generate cash flows equivalent to those expected from the asset.By red ucing the impairment,it would have a positive impact on the financial statements. 【折现率的选择】【不计提减值的动机：对报表和财务指标的影响】 在衡量使用价值时，使用的贴现率应为税前利率，反映当前市场对货币时间价值和资产特定 风险的评估。折现率不应反映未来现金流已调整的风险，而应等于投资者在选择产生与资产 预期现金流相等的现金流的投资时所需的回报率。通过减少减值，将对财务报表产生积极影 响。 The offer of a salary increase is inappropriate and no action should be taken until the situati on is clarified.Inappropriate financial reporting raises issues and risks for those involved and others associated with the company.Whilst financial reporting involves judgement,it would appear that this situation is related to judgement.There are several potential breaches of ac counting standards and unethical practices being used by the director. 加薪的是不适当的，在情况澄清之前，不应采取任何行动。不当的财务报告会给相关人员和 与公司相关的其他人员带来问题和风险。虽然财务报告涉及判断，但这种情况似乎与判断有 问 题 种 风 险 财 务 报 告 关。 ONLINE DELIVERY-PLATINUM The director is trying to coerce the accountant into acting unethically.IAS 1 Presentation of Financial Statements requires al standards to be applied if fair presentation is to be obtained Directors cannot choose which standards they do or do not apply. 董事会有几起潜在的违反会计准则和不道德行为。主任试图强迫会计做出不道德的行为。 IAS1 如果要获得公允列报，就必须采用所有标准。董事不能选择他们适用或不适用的标准 It is important that acountants identify issues of unethical practice and act appropriately in a ccordance with ACCA's Codes of Ethics.The accountant should discuss the maters with th e director.The technical issues should be explained and the risks of non -compliance explai ned to the director.If the director refuses to comply with accounting standards,then it woul d be appropriate to discuss the matter with others affected such as other directors and seek professional advice from ACCA. 会计师应识别不道德行为的问题，并根据ACCA 的道德规范采取适当行动。会计应与主管讨 论此事。应向董事解释技术问题和不合规风险。如果董事拒绝遵守会计准则，则宜与其他受 影响的董事(如其他董事)讨论该事项，并向ACCA 寻求专业建议。 Legal advice should be considered if necessary.An acCountant who comes under presSure f rom senior colleagues to make inappropriate valuations and discloSures should discuSS the mater with the person suggesting this.The discussion should try to confirm the facts and th e reporting guidance which needs to be followed. 如有必要，应考虑法律建议。如果一名会计师受到高级同事的压力，要求其做出不适当的估 值和披露，那么他应该与提出这一建议的人讨论这一问题。讨论应尽量确认需要遵循的事实 和报告指南。 Financial reporting does involve judgement but the cases above seem to be more than just diferences in opinion.The accountant should keep a record of conversations and actions an d discuss the matters with others affected by the decision,such as directors.Additionally,re signation should be considered if the maters cannot be satisfactorily resolved. 财务报告确实涉及主观判断，会计师应记录对话和行动，与受决策影响的其他人(如董事) 讨论相关事宜。此外，如果无法令人满意地解决问题，应考虑辞职。

stem_zh: 51. Goodwillimpairment According to IAS 36 Impairment of Assets,a cash generating unit to which goodwill is allocated should be tested for impairment annually by comparing its carrying amount to its recoverable amount.As goodwill has been calculated using the proportionate method,then this must be grossed up to include the goodwill attributable to the NCI.$m51Total notional goodwillNet assets at reporting date:Fair value at start of period Profit for period212Total carying amount of assets Recoverable amountImpairmentGoodwillNotional NCI ($51mx20/80)(275250··80)25·816052 the proportionate method,then this must be grossed up to include the goodwill attributable to the NCI. $m 51 Total notional goodwill Net assets at reporting date: Fair value at start of period Profit for period 212 Total carying amount of assets Recoverable amount Impairment Goodwill Notional NCI ($51mx20/80) (275250··80) 25·8 160 52 因为前面计算NCI用的proportion method,所以计算出来的是partial goodwill,在做减值测 试的时候首先需要针对于 partial goodwil 去进行gross up, 算出 notional NCl goodwill 是 51/80*20=12.8. 再去做减值测试，是比较当天子公司的净资产+商誉和子公司的RA。子公司RA是题目已知 的250 .子公司年底的净资产是收购日当天的净资产160+这一年的利润52,因为利润越多， 权益越大。所以子公司的净资产+商誉是63.8+212和 RA250 比较，得出整个子公司总共减值 了25.8. The impairment is allocated against the total notional goodwill.The NCI share of the goodwill has not been recognised in the consolidated financial statements and so the NCI share of the impairment is also not recognised.The impairment charged to profit or loss is therefore $20·6 million($25·8mx80%)and this expense is allattributable to the equity holders of the parent company. Dr Operating expenses Cr Goodwill $20·6 $20·6 million million The carrying amount of the goodwill relating to Chandler at the reporting date will be $30·4 million($51m acquisition- $20·6m impairment). 减值了25.8,首先要去冲减商誉，商誉总金额为63.8,那么减值25.8当中80%需要由母公 司承担，20%需要由少数股东承担，金额分别为20.6和5.2.因为子公司的商誉当中归属于少 数股东的部分都没有确认在报表上，所以子公司的商誉减值损失当中由少数股东承担的部分 也不应该确认在报表上。所以真正需要确认在合并报表上的只是子公司的商誉减值当中由母 公司承担的部分20.6.所以分录是贷方商誉的减少，借方减值损失费用，那么年底合并资产 负债表上商誉的期末数为51-20.6=30.4。 Requirement
explanation_zh: (ii)Discuss,with suitable calculations,how the investment in Doyle should be dealt with in the consolidated financial statements for the year ended 30 September 20X6.(7 marks) 题目解析：对 D 公司的投资应该如何在合并报表上进行账务处理。 答案解析： Doyle The share sale results in Hill losing control over Doyle.The goodwill,net assets and NCl of Doyle must be derecognised from the consolidated statement of financial position.The difference between the proceeds from the disposal(including the fair value of the shares retained)and these amounts will give rise to a$47 million profit on disposal.This is calculated as follows: $m $m Proceeds 140 Fair value of remaining interest 300 440 Goodwill at disposal (50)Net assets at disposalNCI:At acquisition 215NCI%of post acquisition profit(40%×($590m-$510m)) 32NCI at disposal ONLINE DELIVERY247NUMProfit on disposal 47 Goodwill at disposal (50) Net assets at disposal NCI: At acquisition 215 NCI%of post acquisition profit(40%×($590m-$510m)) 32 NCI at disposal ONLINE DELIVERY247NUM Profit on disposal 47 母公司本身持有D 公司60%的股份，但是在今年年中的时候卖掉了20%的股份，所以剩下 的持股比例为40%。这笔交易形式上来看是仅仅卖掉了20%的股份，其实质是把子公司卖掉 了，然后再买入了一个联营公司。所以既然是把子公司卖掉了，所以要计算处置的里的或损 失。根据题目可以得知：20%的股份卖掉收到的钱是140,剩下的40%的持股比例在处置日 当天的 FV 是300.这就是这60%的股份本身的FV 合计在一起是440.减掉这60%的股份在 处置日当天在合并报表上的 CV。我们是用在处置日当天子公司100%的净资产和商誉减去处 置日当天40%的少数股东权益在合并报表上的账面价值，那么差额就是这60%的股份在处置 日当天在合并报表上的CV。根据题目意思可以得知：处置日当天子公司的净资产是590, 商誉在收购日当天是50,这期间一直没有减值，所以在处置日当天子公司的商誉金额也是 50.处置日当天NCI 的金额=收购日当天NCI的金额215+成为子公司的这一段时间子公司净资 产的变动当中归属于NCI 的持股比例，即(处置日当天子公司的净资产590-收购日当天子公 司的净资产510)*NCI的持股比例40%=32.所以这60%的股份在处置日当天在合并报表上的 CV=590+50-(215+32)=393, 所以处置的利得为440-393=47. After the share sale,Hill owns 40%of Doyle's shares and has the ability to appoint two of the six members of Doyle's board of directors.IAS 28 Investments in Associates and Joint Ventures states that an associate is an entity over which an investor has significant influence.Significant influence is presumed when the investor has a shareholding of between 20 and 50%.Representation on the board of directors provides further evidence that significant influence exists. Therefore,the remaining 40%shareholding in Doyle should be accounted for as an associate.It will be initally recognised at its fair value of $300 million and accounted for using the equity method.This means that the group recognises its share of the associate's profit after tax,which equates to $24·6 million($123mx6/12×40%).As at the reporting date,the associate will be carried at $324·6million($300m+$24·6m)in the consolidated statement of financial position. 卖掉股份之后仅仅持有40%的股份，且根据题目意思可以得知可以任命 D 公司6名董事当 中的2名董事。所以剩下40%的持股比例是属于对联营公司的投资，按照权益法做账。 初始入账按照当天40%股份在公允价值入账，即investment in associate的初始入账金额为 300,后续计量是只要联营公司的有利润或者其他综合收益，那么投资方就能享有其中的40% 去调整账面，根据题意可以得知，联营公司今年一整年的利润是123,但是成为我的联营公 司只有半年，所以成为我的联营公司之后利润是123*6/12=61.5.因为持股比例是40%,所 以投资方认为61.5的利润中有资格分享其中的40%,所以是24.6,分录是 Dr investment in A 24.6,Cr share of profit of A 24.6. 所以合并资产负债表上 investment in A 的期末数为324.6. Requirement解析： ii)Discuss,with suitable calculations,how the convertible bond should be dealt with in the consolidated financial statements for the year ended 30 September 20X6,showing any adjustments required.(6 marks) 题目解析：可转债应该如何在合并报表上进行账务处理。 答案解析： Convertible bond Hill has issued a compound instrument because the bond has characteristics of both a financial liability(an obligation to repay cash)and equity (an obligation to issue a fixed number of Hil's owh shares).IAS 32 Financial Instruments: Presentation specifies that compound instruments must be split into: - a liability component(the obligation to repay cash); - an equity component (the obligation to issue a fixed number of shares). The split of the liability component and the equity component at the issue date is calculated as follows: - the liability component is the present value of the cash repayments,discounted using the market rate on non-convertible bonds; - the equity component is the difference between the cash received and the liability component at the issue date. The initial carrying amount of the liability should have been measured at $17·9 million,calculated as follows: Date Cash flow Discount rate Present value $m $m 30 September 20X6 0·8 0·909 0·73 30 September 20X7 20·8 0·826 17·18 17·91 根据题目意思可以得知：在今年年初的时候公司发行了可转债，但是公司将发行可转债收到 的钱全部的计入了金融负债，其实这样的做法是错误的，因为可转债是复合型的金融工具， 同时具备负债和权益的特征，所以根据准则规定发行可转债所收到的钱一部分要列入金融负 债，一部分要计入权益工具。所以需要进行账务调整。其中列示在金融负债的金额等于未来 要支付的现金流的现值，即未来要支付的利息和未来要偿还的本金的现值合计数=17.91.所以 列示进权益的部分是发行价20-17.9=2.1. 所以调整分录如下：因为公司将20全部计入金融负债，其实真正计入金融负债的金额只应 该是17.9,所以借方金融负债调低2.1,贷方权益工具调增2.1。 The equity component should have been initially measured at $2·1 million($20m-$17·9m). The adjustment required is: Dr Non-current liabilities $2·1m Cr Equity $2·1m The equity component remains unchanged.After initial recognition,the liability is measured at amortised cost,as follows: 1 October 20X5 Finance charge(10%) 17 9 1 8$m $m 17 9 1 8 (0 8)Cash paid $m (0 8) 18 930 September 20X6 $m 18 9 The finance cost recorded for the year was $0·8 million and so must be increased by $1-0 million($1·8m-$0·8m). 对于权益工具在持有的过程当中是不需要调整的，对于金融负债在持有的过程当中需要每年 去计算利息和支付利息，年初金融负债的金额为17.9.所以到年底我们支付利息的义务是年 初欠的钱17.9*实际利率10%,即1.8,这会增加金融负债和利息费用。年底我们也会实际支 付持有方利息，真正支付的利息是用面值*票面利率即20*4%=0.8,这会减少金融负债和现 金。 Dr Finance costs $1 ·0m Cr Non-current liabilities $1 ·0m The liability has a carrying amount of $18·9million as at the reporting date. 所以第一年年底金融负债的期末数为18.9. Requirement 解析： (b)Required:Discuss the proposed treatment of Hill's deferred tax asset and the financial reporting issues raised by its loan covenant breach.(9 marks) 题目解析：亏损能否确认递延所得税资产以及负债流动性的划分。 解题思路： (1)公司在年底时违反了长期贷款协议导致公司产生了需要立即偿还该笔贷款的义务，所 以站在年底看该笔贷款应该属于流动负债，但是公司错误的将其列示为长期负债。 (2)年后银行同意就算违约了企业也不需要立即偿还贷款，这属于期后非调整事项，不影 响年底负债流动性的划分。 (3)公司没有足额的资金偿还贷款，这对公司未来能否持续经营产生了影响。 答案解析： Deferred tax According to IAS 12 Income Taxes,an entity should recognise a deferred tax asset in respect of the carry-forward of unused tax losses to the extent that it is probable that future taxable profit will be available against which the losses can be utilised. 这个是亏损能不能确认DTA 的条件，是准则的原文，建议大家背下来。 IAS 12 stresses that the existence of unused losses is strong evidence that future taxable profit may not be available.For this reason,convincing evidence is required about the existence of future taxable profits. 公司这三年都是亏损，这其实就是一个强有力的证据证明企业未来也可能不会盈利。因此， 企业针对于现在的亏损要想确认DTA 的话，那么就必须给出说服性的证据去证明未来有足 够多的应税利润。 IAS 12 says that entities should consider whether the tax losses result from identifiable causes which are unlikely to recur.Hill has now made losses in three consecutive financial years,and therefore significant doubt exists about the likelihood of future profits being generated. 在分析未来是否有足够多的应税利润时，我们需要去分析这三年出现亏损的原因，看这些原 因会不会再次发生。如果未来也会发生的话，那说明未来未来也可能是亏损，那么现在的亏 寻就没有办法在未来去抵税，也就不能确认 DTA。 Although Hill is forecasting an improvement in its trading performance,this is a result of new products which are currently under development.It will be difficult to reliably forecast the performance of these products.More emphasis should be placed on the performance of existing products and existing customers when assessing the likelihood of future trading profits. 尽管题目中说到了公司预测未来业绩会大大提高，一旦公司新产品投放市场，但是这个并不 是一个强有力的证据，因为现在这个产品还处于研发过程当中，能不能研发成功还是一个问 题，就算研发成功之后投放到市场能不能被市场所接纳也是一个未知数。而且我们在预测未 来公司的利润或业绩时更多得应该以现有的产品现有的市场现有的客户群体为基础去估计。 Finally,Hill breached a bank loan covenant and some uncertainty exists about its ability to continue as a going concern.This,again,places doubts on the likelihood of future profits and suggests that recognition of a deferred tax asset for unused tax losses would be inappropriate Based on the above,it would seem that Hill is incorrect to recognise a deferred tax asset in respect of its unused tax losses. 而且题目中说到了公司今年违反了银行贷款的协议，产生了需要立即全额返还贷款的义务， 然而公司又没有足额的资金去偿还，所以会引发公司能否持续经营的问题，这也再次证明未 来有没有足够多的应税利润存在重大不确定性，因此，公司现在针对于亏损全额确认DTA 是不正确的。 Covenant breach Hill is currently presenting the loan as a non-current liability.IAS 1 Presentation of Financial Statements states that a liability should be presented as current if the entity: - settles it as part of its operating cycle,or - is due to settle the liability within 12 months of the reporting date,or - does not have an unconditional right to defer settlement for at least 12 months after the reporting date. Hill breached the loan covenants before the reporting date but only received confirmation after the reporting date that the loan was not immediately repayable.As per IAS 10 Events after the Reporting Period,the bank confimation is a non-adjusting event because,as at the reporting date,Hill did not have an unconditional night to defer settlement of the loan for at least 12 months.In the statement of financial position as at 30 September 20X6 the loan should be reclassified as a current liaility. 首先要回答关于流动负债和长期负债的定义，这是答案的前五行在回答的内容。其次要结合 案例进行分析：因为我们企业在今年年底就违约了，所以就有了义务需要将贷款立即偿还， 所以就是属于流动负债。虽然债权人同意说就算你违约也不需要你立即偿还，但是债权人同 意是在年后在同意，这一客观事实出现在年后，所以这是属于期后非调整事项，不应该反映 在今年的财报当中，所以该负债在今年的财报当中就应该是流动负债，公司是将其列示成为 了长期负债，所以做错了。 Going concern Although positive forecasts of future performance exist,management must consider whether the breach of the loan covenant and the recent trading losses place doubt on Hil's ability to continue as a going concern.If material uncertainties exist,then disclosures should be made in accordance with IAS 1. 公司今年年底需要立即偿还贷款，但是整个集团又没有足够多的现金流去偿还，所以就需要 去考虑持续经营的问题，如果公司的持续经营具有重大的不确定性，那么需要根据IAS1号 准则进行披露。

stem_zh: 6. 考试形式 4- 7.考试题型及分值分配 5- 8.如何搜索ACCA 官网历年真题 5- 9.使用官方机考平台的优点 7- 10.使用官网机考练习平台操作说明 7- 11.如何查看正确答案? 9- 1.科目介绍 从2018年9月考季开始，SBR 科目替代了原有的P2《公司报告》,进入ACCA 考试范围。 SBR《战略商业报告》是FR《财务报告》的后续课程，它更加深入地考察对于会计准则的掌握，会计职业 道德的应用，以及在商业环境下对财务报告原理和做法的运用与评估。 SBR 要求考生具备以下能力：了解财务会计的概念框架，熟悉并熟练应用会计准则的相关规定，编制集团 合并财务报表，理解会计事项的处理对于利益相关方的影响，解决在准则应用中涉及的职业道德问题等。 2.近2年全球通过率 The Global Pass Rate of Strategic Business Reporting(SBR)(2022.03-2023.12) Mar/22 Mar/22 June/22 Sep/22 Dec/22 Mar/23 June/23 Sep/23 Dec/23 46% 46% 49% 51% 47% 50% 51% 50% 50% 《战略商业报告》近3年全球通过率，详细数据可登陆ACCA全球官网，输入“Passrate”查询 《战略商业报告》近3年全球通过率，详细数据可登陆ACCA全球官网，输入“Passrate”查询 高顿ACCA,为学员赢得世界尊重 3.Syllabus and Study Guide考试大纲与科目知识结构 3.Syllabus and Study Guide考试大纲与科目知识结构 (A) 将会计师的基本道德原则和职业规范应用于实际案例中，评估不道德行为对公司利益相关方的影响。 (B) 了解财务会计的概念框架，并能够辩证讨论其发展变化对于财务报告的影响。 (C) 针对不同类别的企业财务报告，能够应用会计准则，对其施加专业性判断，并给出专业建议。 注：此部分需要了解各个行业的财务报告，包括单体公司，集团公司，非盈利组织等。 (D) 编制集团合并财务报表。 (E ) 从不同的利益相关方角度，分析及解读财务报表。 (F) 讨论会计制度的现有及未来潜在变革对于财务报告的影响。 (G) 展示就业能力和信息技术对于财务的重要性 Fundamental ethical and professional principles(A) The financial reporting framework(B) Reporting the financial performance of a range of entries(C) Financial statements of groups of entities(D) Interpreting financial statements for different stakeholders(E) The impact of changes in accounting regulation(F) Employability and technology skills(G) 高 顿ACCA, 为学员赢得世界尊重 4.新旧考纲的主要变化 4.新旧考纲的主要变化 1.A1 a)-Fundamental ethical and professional principles - 增加了对可持续发展准则和当代商业 场景的参考。 2.C4 b)-Leases - 增加了对于转租的会计处理的参考。 3.C11-Other reporting issues - 修改了IAS 1 Presentation of Financial Statements 相关的学习 目标，并明确了财务报表的特征、结构以及内容也在考核范围内。 4.E1e)-Analysis and interpretation of financial and non-financial information and measurement of performance.- 扩大了披露相关的学习目标，需要根据 IFRS Accounting Standards and IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards的要求进行披露。 5.F1 d)-Discussion of issues in financial reporting - 对于 IFRS S1 以及 S2的学习目标进行了 细化。考生需要了解 IFRS 可持续发展信息披露标准和欧洲可持续发展报告标准之间关于 CSRD 报告(企业可 持续发展报告指令)要求的高度差异。关键差异会在examinable documents 中详细列示。 5.科目关联性 SBR 是 ACCA 财务会计体系下的最后一门课程，它是 Financial Accounting(FA) 和 Financial Reporting (FR) 的后续课程，在FA 和FR 的基础上更加深入地考察考生对会计准则的掌握，以及运用相关知识进行财 务分析的能力。 后续课程中，SBR与 ACCA的最后一门选修课程 Advanced Audit and Assurance(AAA)关联密切，该科目需 要考生基于对会计准则的理解，评估审计风险，执行相关审计程序，做出审计师的职业判断。 Strategic Business Reporting(SBR)FinancialReporting(FR)FinancialAccounting(FA)Advanced Audit and Assurance(AAA) Strategic Business Reporting(SBR) Financial Reporting(FR) Financial Accounting(FA) Advanced Audit and Assurance(AAA) 6.考试形式 6.考试形式 考试时长：3小时15分钟(考试开始前有10分钟阅读考试说明的时间) 自2021年3月考季起，中国大陆地区P 阶段科目均改革为CBE 机考 高顿为您提供 P 阶段各科目《机考操作指南》,帮助您更快适应P 阶段机考模式 高顿ACCA, 为学员赢得世界尊重 √ 网课位置：高顿网校自主学习阶段 √ 面授位置：高顿网校-实景课包内 7.考试题型及分值分配 7.考试题型及分值分配
Q1总分值为30分，主要考察集团公司的合并报表，或合并报表的部分内容的编制(即考纲第四部分 Part D), 同时也可能需要考生针对企业制作财务报告出现的准则问题进行分析处理(即考纲第三部分Part C)。
Q1 考生需注意除了计算之外，需结合案例适当给与文字的解释和对于案例的讨论分析。
Q2 总分值为20分，主要考察的是职业道德和准则应用问题。在特定案例情境中，考生需要能够找到题目 中出现的道德问题和会计处理问题，并对这些问题加以分析判断，给到会计人员处理意见，并说明对于公 司各个利益相关方的影响。
Section B: 共50分，2道必做题，每道题25分。

Q3&4与原P2的 Q2&3较为相似，主要通 I 过公司案例，考察会计准则的应用和理解，并会有部分计算的要 求。考生需要通过对比国际会计准则，分析公司对于某些事项的会计处理是否正确，是否符合准则要求。 考试内容则会覆盖考纲的任何方面。 同时，Q3&4 中会有一整道题或一道题中的某小问，考察不同利益相关方角度下，对于财务及非财务信息的 分析评估及影响。因此，需要考生能够了解不同利益相关方对于财务报告的需求程度，并结合案例进行分 析。 4分的professional marks 专业分将分别出现在Q2以及Q4。 Current issue 考生需要注意，考纲第六部分 (PART F) 中涉及会计制度的现有及未来潜在变革对于财务报告的影响，可 能会出现在Section A 和 Section B中，一般不会为一整道题考察，而是作为一道题中的某个小问来考察。 因此，考生需要了解会计制度目前存在的问题，以及解决方案等。包括对于一些热门话题的讨论，如：数 字资产、自然灾害、气候变化、可持续经营以及 IFRS 可持续披露准则。 8.如何搜索ACCA 官网历年真题 第1步：进入ACCA官网www.accaglobal.com,点击“Student”→“Study support resources” ACCA Think Ahead Search..
